name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Never Again and Vaccine Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Today is the first day of the Minnesota State Fair and our [Never Again booth](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_booth_at_the_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=2) is getting a lot of attention! Thousands of people are signing our petitions, spinning the Wheel of Tyranny, putting on our Dump Walz shirts, and posting pictures on social media. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_booth_at_the_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=3) We could not have done this without the tremendous work of the countless volunteers who have signed up to spread our message. We had sixteen people working our booth already today. Off to a great start! **But the work is clearly not done. I left the fairground this afternoon and headed up to Coon Rapids in the rain to stand for health freedom with nurses and patriots who want to Stop the Mandate.** Governor Walz and authoritarians in both government and the private sector are crushing our personal freedoms. Many of our frontline workers are about to lose their jobs for refusing to get the experimental vaccine.
## THIS IS NOT RIGHT!
Did you know that Governor Walz is calling back the Minnesota Legislature in September to vote on a whopping $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill? Nurses are about to receive a small bonus from the government, while at the same time get FIRED for refusing to inject themselves with the experimental vaccine. We must stand up for them and continue building this movement and hold our elected officials accountable. Legislators need to **pledge to you** to not vote for a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it has the Rep Erik Mortensen [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=4) attached to it.
## **Here's what it does:**
**== > Restricts government, business, educational facilities and medical facilities from mandating vaccination as a requirement for work** **== > Stops vaccine passports implementation in Minnesota to protect private health rights** **== > Nullifies any President Biden executive orders or laws by the U.S. Congress in the state of Minnesota; makes them unenforceable** We've heard back from many Republican legislators who are resisting signing the pledge and just lazily blaming things on the Democrats. But they need to be reminded that they work for you! And they CAN do something about this loss of our freedoms. But they need to ACT NOW!!! Demand that your state representative and state senator signs the [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge**](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=5) and sends the signed pledge to pledge@action4liberty.com | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=6 "Find My Legislator") [Find My Legislator](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=6)
---
**Sample Script**
Dear ______, do not agree to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill in the upcoming Special Session until you protect health care workers' jobs by adding the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment to it. Show you are on our side by signing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge at this link: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge.
**Alternate Script**
Dear ________, there is no issue more important that protecting our health rights and privacy. That's why I want you to pledge to us that you will not support the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** attached to it. We expect you to sign this or we will make sure all your voters know that you wouldn't stand up for health freedom. Here's the pledge: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge
Don't let your representative and senator try to divert from what you are asking them to do. They will likely make false accusations at us or say this isn't possible. BUT THESE ARE LIES! It's only impossible if your legislators doesn't support this Amendment! They MUST do the right thing.
Once you are done contacting your legislator, please send me an email. I love hearing from you!
**If you are coming to the State Fair, make sure to swing by our booth and meet us. If you can't make it but support our cause, please consider donating to get our message out to tens of thousands of more Minnesotans by[donating today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=7).**
Let's stand up to these authoritarians who want to DESTROY our freedoms. And make sure it **NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN!**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_and_vaccine&n=10), software for leaders.

subject: Biden Should Resign for this Tragedy...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4c79ad664a8d/join-us-tomorrow-morning-for-a-major-announcement-5633397?e=c2296cffff)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=da7e091475&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, My heart goes out to those tragically killed and wounded in today’s heart-breaking events in Afghanistan. The chaos from today only reinforces the point... **This administration is _incapable_ of leading, and the President in charge has failed our country. That is why I am calling for him to resign immediately. **

This administration’s complete failure to create a strategic plan for withdrawal has now left U.S. Service Members and Afghans _dead_ on the ground in Afghanistan.

I first called on Joe Biden to resign on August 16, and now at least 12 U.S. Service Members are dead and more are wounded because of the President’s failed leadership. This is exactly why I continue to press Biden to do the right thing and******RESIGN** from his position - **_he clearly doesn’t have what it takes to be Commander in Chief!_** [**I need you to join me today -****demand that Biden be held accountable for this tragedy!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ef1e45169e&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [JOIN HERE: DEMAND BIDEN'S RESIGNATION!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=e1e9560863&e=c2296cffff "JOIN HERE: DEMAND BIDEN'S RESIGNATION!")
---
| **Let’s not let it go unaddressed - I hope you’ll join the call for Biden’s resignation ASAP before even more tragedies like this occur.** Help spread the word about our efforts to get him to RESIGN from his duties - **support the fight below!**
---
| [RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=356c13ae54&e=c2296cffff "RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT")
---
| Thank you for the support, _Amanda Makki_

name: Herschel Walker
subject: re: Sean Hannity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)

---
Peter,

Last night I was on Sean Hannity, **[and I wanted to make sure you saw the highlight reel!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)
As I discussed with Sean, I launched my Senate campaign in Georgia because **I believe in putting in hard work to achieve the American Dream. EVERYONE should have the opportunity to achieve their dreams.**

Unfortunately, our national leaders are too busy putting their self-interests first and playing politics to see the harm they are causing our country.

Americans are hurting and deserve a leader who will PUT THIS COUNTRY FIRST. I'm that leader, Peter, **[and it's why I'm asking for you to join my team today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)**

[** CHIP IN $10 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198584:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)
[** CHIP IN $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198585:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)
[** CHIP IN $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198586:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)
I have what it takes to stand up to D.C. politicians, WIN this race, and help WIN BACK the Senate majority. **[But I can't do it without your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)**

I've played a lot of sports, and I know it takes a strong team to achieve a common goal. I know we have what it takes to win. With your help, we can BEAT our opponent this election.

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)
I appreciated Sean having me on his show because, Peter, even though I just announced my candidacy; this Senate race is already heating up.

Before I even announced my candidacy, my opponent launched ATTACKS against me. It's clear my opponent is terrified of my campaign.

We don't need to worry about outraising our opponent, but we do need to build the momentum necessary to WIN THIS RACE.

It takes a strong team, Peter. Please, join me today. Let's WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)
Herschel Walker

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198583:JmnR3j2AN:m:1:3253819041:08F820E8FEB96FB0FFEA863405550DD2:r)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: A Special Video Message from President Donald J. Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198632:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198631:6G1taj2Nt:m:1:3253819041:B92794364ACF4E7BBD672F05A8A6E382:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})
---

name: INDems HQ
subject: Tell Senators Young and Braun to Put People Over Partisanship
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34731152/302892682/-1402626811?Braun.Young.Petition.08.26.21.=Braun.Young.Petition.08.26.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjMwMWFjMi0yMTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kvC1MU4fqEGJrHYKkvrorpoU5uHHnLPgh_9vfTbzf4=&emci=21a3818e-8c06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a2301ac2-2107-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) **Peter** : President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have been hard at work creating a better future for Indiana and Hoosier families. By passing legislation like the American Rescue Plan and the upcoming American Jobs Plan, Democrats are working overtime to deliver for all families across Indiana. Indiana Democrats made a promise to deliver solutions to today's most pressing problems facing Hoosier families in all 92 counties. However, U.S. Senators Mike Braun and Todd Young are putting their partisanship ahead of Hoosier families by voting "NO" on both the American Rescue Plan and the American Jobs Plan that provides Indiana $250 million for broadband internet expansion, $6.6 billion to fix our crumbling roads, and $401 million to repair our bridges. Indiana Republicans like Mike Braun and Todd Young are claiming Democrats are recklessly spending in Washington, D.C, yet under their watch, they supported a $2.3 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America's richest while the national debt ballooned by $7.8 trillion...in just four years. Hoosiers are tired of the unnecessary partisanship that does nothing to help improve their families and communities. Let Mike Braun** _ _** and Todd Young know that you demand they put people over partisanship. **You've been identified as a top IN Democrat, so we're counting on you to speak out. **Sign your name to the petition to let Republicans know it's time for this once-in-a-generation investment in Indiana. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Peter : President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have been hard at work creating a better future for Indiana and Hoosier families. By passing legislation like the American Rescue Plan and the upcoming American Jobs Plan, Democrats are working overtime to deliver for all families across Indiana. Indiana Democrats made a promise to deliver solutions to today's most pressing problems facing Hoosier families in all 92 counties. However, U.S. Senators Mike Braun and Todd Young are putting their partisanship ahead of Hoosier families by voting "NO" on both the American Rescue Plan and the American Jobs Plan that provides Indiana $250 million for broadband internet expansion, $6.6 billion to fix our crumbling roads, and $401 million to repair our bridges. Indiana Republicans like Mike Braun and Todd Young are claiming Democrats are recklessly spending in Washington, D.C, yet under their watch, they supported a $2.3 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America's richest while the national debt ballooned by $7.8 trillion...in just four years. Hoosiers are tired of the unnecessary partisanship that does nothing to help improve their families and communities. Let Mike Braun and Todd Young know that you demand they put people over partisanship. You've been identified as a top IN Democrat, so we're counting on you to speak out. Sign your name to the petition to let Republicans know it's time for this once-in-a-generation investment in Indiana. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

Peter,

We're now counting down from just 3 weeks out from Election Day in the recall against failed California Governor Gavin Newsom.

Voting by mail has been going on for over a week now. Every day that goes by means thousands of more ballots are being returned with votes for, or against, the recall.

With the election coming down to a "photo finish," [**we can 't miss a single opportunity to get out every YES vote we can for the recall.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198916:J16pfj2NG:m:1:3253819041:545C6C13FC884CBDC0DEAD6F8B41C52E:r)

We need your continued support down the home stretch so we can recall Gavin Newsom and save California.

[**With just T-minus 3 weeks to left to go, will you continue to support Larry Elder 's ballot committee to recall Gavin Newsom by rushing a donation of $25, $40, $75 or even $100 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58198916:J16pfj2NG:m:1:3253819041:545C6C13FC884CBDC0DEAD6F8B41C52E:r)

name: Mary Vought
subject: Taliban, Illegals, and Criminals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Have you noticed this year that Democrats treat the
Taliban, illegal immigrants, and violent criminals better than
they treat American moms and dads?

Think about it:

▶︎ Take over Afghanistan and behead innocent
people in the streets of Kabul, and Joe Biden will bend over
backward to work with you.

▶︎ Pay a cartel-connected coyote to sneak you
across our Southern border, and Chuck Schumer will welcome you
in.

▶︎ Loot, vandalize, and assault the citizens of
an American city for months on end, and Nancy Pelosi will say
it's all the police's fault.

But, if you ask for scientific evidence why your
kids have to wear masks at school, or why their schools teach
that men can give birth, then Democrats take out the big guns.

To them, America's real problem isn't terrorism, the
border crisis, inflation, or the crime wave: it's YOU.

THIS IS WHAT DEMOCRAT ELITES BELIEVE.

They're not satisfied with destroying our
Constitution, our economy, and our reputation in the world.
They're coming for your kids now, too.

▶︎ Harmful masking rules. ▶︎ Critical Race
Theory.▶︎ Big Tech peddling porn to children.▶︎ Trans
students in girls' bathrooms and sports.

Parents and grandparents - all Americans! - need to
fight back for their kids and for the future of our country.

The Senate Conservatives Fund is the only
organization exclusively committed to building a conservative
Senate that Makes America Great Again. We exist for one reason:
to knock liberals - establishment Republicans and leftist
Democrats - out of Washington.

We only support principled, fighting conservatives.
No socialists. No squishes. No private-jet environmentalists. No
open-border elites. No anti-American propagandists. No
gun-grabbing snowflakes.

We're fighting for the country that generations of
patriots before us built and that our children deserve.

Every dollar you contribute to SCF goes to support
principled, fighting conservative candidates in the most
important Senate races of this election cycle - conservative
fighters like Josh Mandel (R-OH), Mo Brooks (R-AL), and Ted Budd
(R-NC). They're all pro-freedom, pro-America, and pro-Trump.

The Left is financially and morally bankrupting the
country we want to leave to our kids. We can't let them get away
with it.

Please make your most generous contribution today!

The 2022 election isn't next fall or even next year.
It's right now. SCF is actively vetting, recruiting, and helping
the candidates who will change the Republican Party, Washington,
and America.

No one else will lead this fight. No one else can
win it.

Only us. Only you.

Please support SCF today and help us build a
conservative Senate that will truly fight for America's future!

Thank you for considering this urgent request.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/x6XWMbCFvU2fWByvZDXyAg2?contactdata=IYU2C6fHRXkdye8NWgVALLHr4JgOMrUrKrIwd5g8ca8AoLPRNgrJJDb6tVzmvKtxwJxGHhPOEr7USwpxLpUSnrM9mQFJPmifh3030ZRRIpXfkm4%2B351tvMCUJ91Om3N4rpl7xH2Z%2B9ht0ywAv4ZZdw%3D%3D [https://secure.everyaction.com/x6XWMbCFvU2fWByvZDXyAg2?contactdata=IYU2C6fHRXkdye8NWgVALLHr4JgOMrUrKrIwd5g8ca8AoLPRNgrJJDb6tVzmvKtxwJxGHhPOEr7USwpxLpUSnrM9mQFJPmifh3030ZRRIpXfkm4%2B351tvMCUJ91Om3N4rpl7xH2Z%2B9ht0ywAv4ZZdw%3D%3D]

Dear Friend,

As you may know, one of the major functions of Keystone Progress is to provide training for progressives, to further our chances in the next election.

These community trainings are aimed at making sure that everyone votes and that their votes count. We also have an ongoing series, Participate PA, which begins again in September, to bring education, resources, and capacity on voter participation and issues advocacy to community-based organizations.

We'll explore an array of issues that affect our state and lives, such as:

- redistricting;
- the American Rescue Plan funding transparency;
- judicial elections;
- key local elections;
- gun violence;
- community leadership; and
- the COVID response.

To keep informed of upcoming trainings, please sign up here:
https://secure.everyaction.com/x6XWMbCFvU2fWByvZDXyAg2?contactdata=IYU2C6fHRXkdye8NWgVALLHr4JgOMrUrKrIwd5g8ca8AoLPRNgrJJDb6tVzmvKtxwJxGHhPOEr7USwpxLpUSnrM9mQFJPmifh3030ZRRIpXfkm4%2B351tvMCUJ91Om3N4rpl7xH2Z%2B9ht0ywAv4ZZdw%3D%3D [https://secure.everyaction.com/x6XWMbCFvU2fWByvZDXyAg2?contactdata=IYU2C6fHRXkdye8NWgVALLHr4JgOMrUrKrIwd5g8ca8AoLPRNgrJJDb6tVzmvKtxwJxGHhPOEr7USwpxLpUSnrM9mQFJPmifh3030ZRRIpXfkm4%2B351tvMCUJ91Om3N4rpl7xH2Z%2B9ht0ywAv4ZZdw%3D%3D]

Thanks for joining in the fight for a progressive Pennsylvania.

If you'd like to donate to help our efforts, including the expansion of our training programs, please click here.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082721]

In solidarity,

Keystone Progress Education Fund

name: Jim Jordan
subject: COVID Vaccine Mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58199376:6VZ9Bj2NG:m:1:3253819041:2C081350510EA5D48C5FAF427097E07C:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58199376:6VZ9Bj2NG:m:1:3253819041:2C081350510EA5D48C5FAF427097E07C:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58199376:6VZ9Bj2NG:m:1:3253819041:2C081350510EA5D48C5FAF427097E07C:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 27TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58199376:6VZ9Bj2NG:m:1:3253819041:2C081350510EA5D48C5FAF427097E07C:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

clean_body: . | Peter, The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role. We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 27TH One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate. Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Peter,

What happens when a teacher stands up to Critical Race Theory?

_She's forced out of her job by power-hungry monsters._

**Laura Morris, an elementary teacher in Loudoun County, Virginia, had this to say when she tearfully resigned at a school board meeting:_" I'm a Christian woman, and they've said they don't want us here. I've found employment elsewhere."_**

If we don't start standing WITH teachers like her and standing AGAINST Critical Race Theory propagandists, we'll lose ALL the good teachers.

_We stand with Laura Morris and other teachers across the country who are bravely standing up to Critical Race Theory._ **_Do YOU?_**

**[DONATE HERE to help us FIGHT BACK against teachers' unions and school boards that are FORCING Critical Race Theory on teachers AND students. > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58199405:6DG8_j2SN:m:1:3253819041:7EE2730CA2D396753E68B27ABDFB1BBB:r)**

**If the Left indoctrinates our children today, we'll lose America tomorrow.**

The power-hungry unions and radical school board members do not represent us. They are ENEMIES of free thought, objective truth, and the American ideal that all men are created EQUAL.

These failures were elected by We The People - and We The People will REMOVE them.

We need your help, Peter. We need to show these hero teachers who have put their livelihoods on the line for our children that they're not alone. **_WE HAVE TO FIGHT BACK._**

name: Ralph Northam
subject: We have to win this seat to protect our Blue Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HO5jq5exTXHYAwFdJeYmwo7CXkVh58YAb0cYjgYtwtw=/1wXOKBgAvOFlSslfPUk54J5brFXJ2PRn-Mgo-WpCw-Y=)
---
Friend, My friend and former neighbor, Delegate Nancy Guy, has stood with me since I first ran for the Virginia Senate in 2008. Pam and I served with Nancy on our children's PTA decades ago. From PTA President, to two terms on the Virginia Beach School Board, and now a Delegate in the General Assembly, Nancy has worked tirelessly to make her community and our Commonwealth better for all Virginians, especially our children. [**We need to support Nancy to keep this district blue and protect our Democratic Majority in the House of Delegates this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HO5jq5exTXHYAwFdJeYmwo7CXkVh58YAb0cYjgYtwtw=/1wXOKBgAvOFlSslfPUk54J5brFXJ2PRn-Mgo-WpCw-Y=) The 83rd District in Virginia Beach was represented by a Republican for a decade until Nancy flipped it from red to blue two years ago. She won that race by knocking on doors, listening to what mattered to the folks in her community, and promising to be their champion in Richmond. **She has been that champion every step of the way in her first term in the House of Delegates.** [**Can you make a donation to support Nancy 's campaign before her critical end-of-month deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HO5jq5exTXHYAwFdJeYmwo7CXkVh58YAb0cYjgYtwtw=/1wXOKBgAvOFlSslfPUk54J5brFXJ2PRn-Mgo-WpCw-Y=) Nancy won by just **40 votes** in 2019, and the 83rd District will be one of the toughest races in Virginia this year. **She needs your help to get across the finish line.** Thank you for everything you are doing to move Virginia forward. Take care, Ralph

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: re: Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34744329/302930180/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWZiZTQ0NC00MTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7s2pNpLr_qshEYCAnJa-pr0CrNWsfG4cb2mZh-N5TzY=&emci=77c96581-2afe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a1fbe444-4107-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, The situation in Afghanistan is harrowing. The rapid collapse of the Afghan government and security forces to the Taliban has created desperate, urgent conditions on the ground. Circumstances have only deteriorated with the deadly attacks outside Kabul’s airport yesterday. I’m thinking of the U.S. service members and the U.S. and Afghan civilians, including children, whose lives were taken. In the midst of the tragedy and chaos, I am also proud of New Mexico for opening our homes and hearts to refugees. The United States has already helped evacuate 95,700 people since August 14. My Senate office is working day in and day out to help evacuate people and bring them to safety. We must do everything in our power to help as many individuals as possible as this situation evolves. I’ve called on the Biden administration to quickly evacuate American citizens and diplomats, aid workers, and Afghan allies who served alongside U.S. troops and their families. It’s also gravely important that we immediately implement recently-passed legislation to streamline and expand the Special Immigrant Visa process. Time is of the essence here. I know it is easy to feel helpless as this devastating situation unfolds. But there are ways we all can help. If you’re able, [**please sign up to support our evacuated Afghan allies through airport pick-up, apartment set-up, providing meals, and more.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34744331/302930181/1994518982?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWZiZTQ0NC00MTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7s2pNpLr_qshEYCAnJa-pr0CrNWsfG4cb2mZh-N5TzY=&emci=77c96581-2afe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a1fbe444-4107-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045) Thank you. —Martin
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---

clean_body: Stand with the Capitol Police | | | BREAKING: Some of the heroic Capitol Police officers who protected our Democracy on January 6 are taking the fight directly to the source. According to a report in the New York Times, these brave men and women are suing Donald Trump, his allies, and those who perpetrated the “Big Lie.” These brave Capitol Police Officers deserve justice for the horrors inflicted upon them on January 6th. Donald Trump must be held accountable for the deadly insurrection he incited that day. We want to know -- We can’t let what happened on January 6 ever happen again, Derek. That’s why this is so important. If Trump and his allies think they can get away with this, they’ve got another thing coming. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . body:
|

| | Peter, Last week, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media \-- writing, “Dead men can't pass laws”. This is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party \-- and it proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. Right-wing extremists like Edward Florea are threatening Raphael Warnock personally. That means: Goodbye, voting rights reform. Goodbye, universal health care. Goodbye, expansions to Medicare and Social Security. body:
Dear Friends,

We have an end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday at midnight. So do a lot of other candidates, so I want to explain why ours is particularly important.

As Kevin wrote in his memo this week, Nikki is the only candidate who can beat DeSantis--and we need to prepare now to take on his MASSIVE warchest next fall.

Team, if you’re ready to win next year, we need your help today. Please click here to chip in now and help us defeat DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=fri]

DeSantis has raised millions from GOP megadonors, but he’s more vulnerable than ever. Recent polling has shown time and again that DeSantis is vulnerable. His approval rating is underwater, and Floridians disagree with how he’s handled COVID-19.

We’re not surprised. Instead of protecting our children and saving lives, he’s waged a political war on everyone from local school board members to President Biden.

Here’s the bottom line: Ron DeSantis is the most dangerous Governor in the country, and we need to stop him.

Team, if supporters like you can step up, Nikki will break the rigged system that has enabled dangerous leaders like DeSantis for decades. Please click here to chip in now and help us finish August strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=fri]

Thanks,

Marissa Tully

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Do you condemn the GOP's anti-vaccine misinformation campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Hlvw%2FGNk%2FFmh3%2Fsqq778WSqESCvHa3vn&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Even with the delta variant wreaking havoc across the country - particularly in areas with low vaccination rates - Republican politicians and pundits have decided to follow Donald Trump's pandemic playbook rather than get serious about saving lives and defeating the virus.
Exhibit A: Texas and Florida. Republican Govs. Greg Abbott and Ron DeSantis have been fighting night and day - not to protect people with greater access to vaccines or try to slow the spread of the virus, **but to ban schools and municipalities from mandating masks. Hospital ICUs are filling to capacity. The average age of admitted patients is steadily dropping. People are dying. Children under 12, not yet vaccine eligible, are truly innocents completely at the mercy of the behavior of adults around them. How can these supposed "public servants" justify this behavior?**
GOP politicians in Washington are no better. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene - the standard-bearer for the modern-day GOP - has now been suspended from Twitter multiple times for spreading misinformation about the efficacy of COVID vaccines. She and many of her colleagues are also attacking our nation's top infectious disease expert, Dr. Anthony Fauci, and demanding that he be fired.
Here's what we know: The Republican Party has followed Donald Trump off a cliff, throwing sanity and logic out the window in favor of crazed rhetoric and deadly misinformation. **It 's dangerous - and it's up to the silent majority of us who listen to public health experts, take commonsense health measures (like wearing a mask), and believe in vaccines to speak up and condemn the madness.**
**That 's why I am asking you today to condemn, in the strongest possible terms, the anti-science extremism from the Republican Party:**
**[Please, will you sign my petition right now to condemn Republicans for spreading harmful misinformation and demand they be held accountable for their actions? It is time for the"rage of the responsible" to be heard.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-covid?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1063-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-crimes%3Fcode%3Djtk1063-su-nd)**
Vaccines are saving lives and keeping Americans from getting seriously ill and dying from this virus. Masks prevent the spread of increasingly more contagious variants. Social distancing and spending as much social time outside is another weapon against further virus mutation and spread. This isn't rocket science - and any public servant who spreads conspiracies in the midst of a pandemic is not fit to serve.
Together, we can hold lying Republican extremists accountable for their grossly unethical response to this pandemic. Thank you for joining me in speaking out.
Dick
[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1063-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bFx305d%2Bg%2F5GJQJYo9XFhSqESCvHa3vn&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

She and many of her colleagues are also attacking our nation's top infectious disease expert, Dr. Anthony Fauci, and demanding that he be fired. Here's what we know: The Republican Party has followed Donald Trump off a cliff, throwing sanity and logic out the window in favor of crazed rhetoric and deadly misinformation. It 's dangerous - and it's up to the silent majority of us who listen to public health experts, take commonsense health measures (like wearing a mask), and believe in vaccines to speak up and condemn the madness. That 's why I am asking you today to condemn, in the strongest possible terms, the anti-science extremism from the Republican Party: Vaccines are saving lives and keeping Americans from getting seriously ill and dying from this virus. Masks prevent the spread of increasingly more contagious variants. Social distancing and spending as much social time outside is another weapon against further virus mutation and spread. This isn't rocket science - and any public servant who spreads conspiracies in the midst of a pandemic is not fit to serve. Together, we can hold lying Republican extremists accountable for their grossly unethical response to this pandemic. Thank you for joining me in speaking out. Dick

#

**August End-of-Month Fundraising Deadline
Goal:** 500 contributions
**Deadline:** 8/31
**Suggested Donation:** $3
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34751206/302946874/-376196102?refcode2=31895035-4a07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210827-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg5NTAzNS00YTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZIqog9xDfvmY-V2AGDlo6-kiwvn3eLH9c77n_L0ocQ=)**
I just spoke with my finance team, and we’ve made a slightly unusual decision for our end-of-month goal for August.
Instead of aiming for a dollar amount, we’re setting a goal for our total number of contributions. If you read on, I’ll explain this decision in greater detail.
**Okay, here goes: you’re likely aware that, due to redistricting, the parameters of our district will be different by the time our primary rolls around.**
That means we need to be prepared to mobilize a different set of voters — and to potentially lose some of our base from last election. This could spell trouble in the likely event that a primary challenger jumps into this race.
Our movement is strong, and I know we can go up against any opponent and win. But the best way for us to prove that is to galvanize as many donors as possible, as early as possible, to show all of our opponents that we have a huge amount of support. So I’m asking for your help:
**[If you’re able, make a donation today to help us hit our 500 contribution goal by August 31st. The contribution is much more important than the dollar amount, because an outpouring of donations will prove to our opponents that this movement isn’t going anywhere.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34751207/302946875/-376196102?refcode2=31895035-4a07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210827-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg5NTAzNS00YTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZIqog9xDfvmY-V2AGDlo6-kiwvn3eLH9c77n_L0ocQ=)**
Thank you, as always, for your ongoing support. It truly means so much.
Onward,
Mondaire

Whose side do you stand on in what CNN calls the **#1 U.S. Senate race in the country?**

Republican candidates like Sean Parnell and Jeff Bartos want to give Pennsylvania to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump. [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DXur2WccSGMMSYZqg05pzbnbJBIJhIAzxRA-X_MXZT4)

## **🔵 Are you ready for our very own Lolla-BLUE-za? 🔵**
It’s not a music festival, but it is an entire week _FULL_ of exclusive trainings and Q&A’s, led by expert trainers and some _incredible special guests_.

We’re thrilled to announce our inaugural [**Build Blue Week happening the week of September 18 to 24 — all virtually!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..piP7a-UHCnjlhGvlOddNUHkvq2jsei3V6CtelPHnOxQ)

This week of interactive and collaborative programming will bring together a diverse and representative lineup of elected officials, top campaign experts, and Democratic leaders.

[**You won’t want to miss this week of exciting events! Click here to check out the full lineup of trainings and to RSVP for any you want to attend.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WX8uT35kT7dfHooYk5WIiD-OaAmfNqcjQQ2u8et9lfo)
| [GO NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..N_SYGdEooC_Lbm_5jVOcMuT07mu7AkCCWiPNvaG4_ls)
---

* * *

## **Build Blue Week Highlights**
[**Panel Discussion: So You Want to Run for Office**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YyzioXfgQ2glliTVmwCe_bUbczgGJ4Dti4D6XpnStSE)
**Monday, September 20, 2:00pm ET

** Running for office? Or even just thinking about it? Then you’ll want to join **_DNC Chair Jaime Harrison_** and other special guests for our _So You Want to Run for Office_ panel! This discussion gives you the opportunity to tap into the minds of a diverse group of elected officials and party leaders to learn more about running for office. Panelists will share their insights, on-the-ground experiences, and answer any of your burning questions in this interactive session!****

name: Team Malcolm
subject: If everyone who reads this email decided to chip in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our movement is funded by lots of working people chipping in
#

Friend,
If everyone who reads this email decided to chip in before next week's deadline, we would easily surpass the 1,000 donation goal we've set for our campaign.
But the reality is that not everyone will donate, and we need 613 more donations in order to reach our goal.
That's why it's so important that you make your first donation today.
[If you can afford it, please contribute $3 to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for U.S. Senate to help reach our goal before Tuesday's end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34753085/302954975/-353695395?refcode2=c56488db-4f07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210827-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY0ODhkYi00ZjA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfDgPsssCkD7ap6zzphEpiXLZEX40y_Ww_AEnWjUDyI=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34753086/302954978/-353695395?refcode2=c56488db-4f07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210827-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY0ODhkYi00ZjA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfDgPsssCkD7ap6zzphEpiXLZEX40y_Ww_AEnWjUDyI=)**
This is a grassroots campaign. Malcolm is not taking a dime from corporate PACs, or their lobbyists. And he doesn't have millions of dollars to self-fund.
So our movement is funded by lots of working people chipping in a few bucks at a time, all because they believe working people deserve a voice of our own in Washington.
**And for us to win this race and send Malcolm to be a champion for working families, we've got to hit every fundraising goal we set. So we have to ask:**
[Could you chip in $3 to stand with Malcolm today? We wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34753088/302954980/-353695395?refcode2=c56488db-4f07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210827-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY0ODhkYi00ZjA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfDgPsssCkD7ap6zzphEpiXLZEX40y_Ww_AEnWjUDyI=)
Even a modest donation will go a long way toward building the long-term success of our movement to put a working person in the Senate. Thanks in advance for your support.
\- Team Malcolm
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34753089/302954982/-353695395?refcode2=c56488db-4f07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210827-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY0ODhkYi00ZjA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfDgPsssCkD7ap6zzphEpiXLZEX40y_Ww_AEnWjUDyI=)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
VOTE NOW -- Is President Donald Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=702c95b73af047f785a9df5b19f050fc&_t=cWFFWCae2h1d-FLbIguccKJTKg9h5IZENkw-9Y9eRObI5KqodQJxpVwnDbkbUB5PY5Ga_8K57fD1LGWwahEsF3Ew_HaXlRQUN5T_w1Tq3nGGkqa-MWKJZpZDv27eB_5Dd8-edvBiAfNbJbtAei1YpRieeisDfidDHteqWWLiGIs%3D)

| | **\- August**** 27, 2021-** **"I will defend our people and our interests with every measure at my command. To those who carried out this attack: We will not forgive. We will not forget. We will hunt you down and make you pay." -[President Joe Biden on Afghanistan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34755179/302962756/-734785085?s=20&FFF.08.27.21=FFF.08.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZiZjI1Ni01MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBnZ9TjzuNz4XpjZ_nkb8xNNp0yhvNBkJWcPPGjSaiA=&emci=32806491-7706-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=37fbf256-5307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535)** **"Despite extraordinary dangers and risks, we were able to evacuate more than 100,000 people in just a matter of days. We can - and we must - complete our mission. We will not be deterred by terrorists. We will not let them stop our mission. We will continue the evacuation." -[President Joe Biden on Afghanistan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34755180/302962758/1112706555?s=20&FFF.08.27.21=FFF.08.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZiZjI1Ni01MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBnZ9TjzuNz4XpjZ_nkb8xNNp0yhvNBkJWcPPGjSaiA=&emci=32806491-7706-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=37fbf256-5307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535)** **\- Gov. Holcomb Has Not Held a COVID-19 Press Conference in 150 Days -** Gov. Holcomb hasn't addressed the public on the pandemic in 150 days. This week, the Indiana Democratic Party called on Governor Holcomb to provide Hoosiers an update on where the state is in the fight against COVID-19. Indiana families deserve an honest, transparent update on how he's responding to the latest Delta variant surge that's causing major increases in COVID cases and hospitalizations. The last time Indiana experienced a surge like this, Gov. Holcomb described Indiana as being "on fire", but if Holcomb refuses to hold something as simple as a press briefing or town hall on the pandemic, it looks like Indiana Republicans have given up on the pandemic altogether. In contrast, Indiana Democrats have been working tirelessly to try and put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Under President Joe Biden's leadership, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan and delivered much-needed relief for every Zip Code in Indiana, including shots in arms and stimulus checks for families. Democrats are meeting Hoosiers where they are and providing honest conversations and solutions about today's most pressing problems facing their families. **\- Vote on American Jobs Plan Next Month -** President Biden and Indiana Democrats have been delivering on promises from the American Rescue Plan, and next month, we are set to deliver on another promise made to Hoosiers and Americans, the American Jobs Plan. U.S. Congressman André Carson and Frank Mrvan are eager to support the Jobs Plan and solidify this once-in-a-generation infrastructure investment for the state. The vote on elements of the Jobs Plan is expected to happen at the end of September. With the state's crumbling roads and bridges and the Indiana Republican "work more for less" economy, Hoosiers need solutions to issues most important to them - and the Jobs Plan will get this done. Indiana Democrats are ready to expand broadband internet access for families, revitalize public transportation, and land good-paying jobs for workers who are ready for a better future. The American Jobs Plan and President Biden's Build Back Better agenda delivers this opportunity, and the Indiana Democratic Party is set to create this brighter tomorrow for Hoosier families. _**-Save the date-**_ **Wayne County Democrats:**[Centerville Archway Days](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34755181/302962759/1436835612?reset=1&id=7&FFF.08.27.21=FFF.08.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZiZjI1Ni01MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBnZ9TjzuNz4XpjZ_nkb8xNNp0yhvNBkJWcPPGjSaiA=&emci=32806491-7706-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=37fbf256-5307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535), August 27-28, 5 PM - clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- August 27, 2021- "I will defend our people and our interests with every measure at my command. To those who carried out this attack: We will not forgive. We will not forget. We will hunt you down and make you pay." - "Despite extraordinary dangers and risks, we were able to evacuate more than 100,000 people in just a matter of days. We can - and we must - complete our mission. We will not be deterred by terrorists. We will not let them stop our mission. We will continue the evacuation." - \- Gov. Holcomb Has Not Held a COVID-19 Press Conference in 150 Days - Gov. Holcomb hasn't addressed the public on the pandemic in 150 days. This week, the Indiana Democratic Party called on Governor Holcomb to provide Hoosiers an update on where the state is in the fight against COVID-19. Indiana families deserve an honest, transparent update on how he's responding to the latest Delta variant surge that's causing major increases in COVID cases and hospitalizations. The last time Indiana experienced a surge like this, Gov. Holcomb described Indiana as being "on fire", but if Holcomb refuses to hold something as simple as a press briefing or town hall on the pandemic, it looks like Indiana Republicans have given up on the pandemic altogether. In contrast, Indiana Democrats have been working tirelessly to try and put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Under President Joe Biden's leadership, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan and delivered much-needed relief for every Zip Code in Indiana, including shots in arms and stimulus checks for families. Democrats are meeting Hoosiers where they are and providing honest conversations and solutions about today's most pressing problems facing their families. \- Vote on American Jobs Plan Next Month - President Biden and Indiana Democrats have been delivering on promises from the American Rescue Plan, and next month, we are set to deliver on another promise made to Hoosiers and Americans, the American Jobs Plan. U.S. Congressman André Carson and Frank Mrvan are eager to support the Jobs Plan and solidify this once-in-a-generation infrastructure investment for the state. The vote on elements of the Jobs Plan is expected to happen at the end of September. With the state's crumbling roads and bridges and the Indiana Republican "work more for less" economy, Hoosiers need solutions to issues most important to them - and the Jobs Plan will get this done. Indiana Democrats are ready to expand broadband internet access for families, revitalize public transportation, and land good-paying jobs for workers who are ready for a better future. The American Jobs Plan and President Biden's Build Back Better agenda delivers this opportunity, and the Indiana Democratic Party is set to create this brighter tomorrow for Hoosier families. -Save the date- Wayne County Democrats:, August 27-28, 5 PM - 11 PM on Aug. 27 & 9 AM - 11 PM on Aug. 28, Maplewood Park, Centerville, Indiana 47330 Bartholomew County Democratic Party:\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.08.27.21=FFF.08.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZiZjI1Ni01MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBnZ9TjzuNz4XpjZnkb8xNNp0yhvNBkJWcPPGjSaiA=&emci=32806491-7706-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=37fbf256-5307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535, August 28, 9:00 - 12:30 AM, 123 Washington St, Columbus, IN 47201 Cass County Democratic Party: , August 28, 9:00 AM - 10:00 AM, Black Dog Coffee, 116 S 6th St, Logansport, IN 46947 Switzerland County Democratic Party: Swiss Wine Festival Parade, August 28, 10:00 AM, Vevay, IN Elkhart County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.08.27.21=FFF.08.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZiZjI1Ni01MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBnZ9TjzuNz4XpjZnkb8xNNp0yhvNBkJWcPPGjSaiA=&emci=32806491-7706-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=37fbf256-5307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535, August 28, 10:00 AM, Message county Facebook for more details. Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34755711/302964652/-2023814932?refcode=20210827.3_SA_8DY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDdiYTcwYy01NDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPW3orHuXhRh1zyHTdcDmDtlryM3BdpVnwLP5IempCs=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

name: Irene Lin
subject: we deserve better from Democrats in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | **Let me level with you:** we deserve better from Congress. Between the usual filibustering of Republicans and the recent antics of ‘centrist’ Democrats, progress has been delayed on the issues that matter most — the same policies Biden ran and won on.

Right now, it is a fight to even get all Senate Democrats to do what’s needed to secure the right to vote or pass the President’s progressive budget. We should be ashamed, _as the party of working people_ , to have members attempting to block legislation that would greatly benefit hard working Americans.

[Enough is enough — we need more bold, progressive leadership in the Senate. Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73fb56c2f7dd4bfa9bb5b8806bb91f85&_e=28fALj9Sn-_YWKSeiCdBDrd0vDd8QHBQ2wHx4xdXGBxGgYyRdN4qTBW7C7QRbJWO_MDEix9KG_pxmKKcu33SKUCuGH_w_4yOz2k98oOKtYWOfglKQVRgn8PvDikXheCJFZvAjr00Mehh9gG-s2ZRyGQRWqyOs-2jxR8jTD6LdB_KScaiSvUFX8SP1d1qGnvQKpAv7vwbwMx3HrbvLGuBXUjll27u2_JYc6dTUOLqPknP9Xi4lkjOcmCBgDXT7WntD-9XBR9_uiZDonGfxf8TZz1HTPLIYuVnHoAWEACYssqPbxiH7u1XUB_6459ZKumDSfjTfuWFdNktLeEz_IKes0DmRQ24P0OhLJXJlpG5ymuy09whz6f9CLEk58zrKlurMMXBziBAYNbNmCN8buXNSTNPV62vjUY9rF804KBCxtX_hR4wQjnaTN0WgQ6pWtLUWW15IaWgvUbS-Bf9BtK0XYkL-__OZ61NDlKHib7YIaI%3D)**

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73fb56c2f7dd4bfa9bb5b8806bb91f85&_e=28fALj9Sn-_YWKSeiCdBDrd0vDd8QHBQ2wHx4xdXGBxGgYyRdN4qTBW7C7QRbJWO_MDEix9KG_pxmKKcu33SKUCuGH_w_4yOz2k98oOKtYWOfglKQVRgn8PvDikXheCJFZvAjr00Mehh9gG-s2ZRyGQRWqyOs-2jxR8jTD6LdB_KScaiSvUFX8SP1d1qGnvQKpAv7vwbwMx3HrbvLGuBXUjll27u2_JYc6dTUOLqPknP9Xi4lkjOcmCBgDXT7WntD-9XBR9_uiZDonGfxf8TZ0dR7wNeVAxYGHNDGpESNM5N810U4vJ7Oz7JrA_SeTAUy-uzU1zqW1O2mhgSCLwVW58o5v3hjec1jJgTKOnvH1QztIsXu6qsZ5OgnPmFnM99x5Hr_qXAqBK1WTlR7W9IHjUVGAetTgCCMIl4bkpeEyfl_Bwr9jLNC7kUa0_KtLOladagB9m5LRaJgle4Hk-nYFrjhCUNeIRlVSKDQHOHDHw%3D)**

At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

Bad news, folks: **The Texas legislature just passed _SB 1_ — one of the worst voter suppression bills in the nation.** And during the 12 hours of debate, House Speaker Dade Phelan even refused to allow anyone on the floor to talk about the discriminatory effects _SB 1_ will have on communities of color. **Make no mistake:** this bill is designed to help Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott evade accountability for a rickety power grid, a criminal response to COVID-19, and years of failed leadership. It’s nothing but a power grab to keep Republicans in power. Instead of focusing on supporting hospitals and health care workers overwhelmed by the recent surge of COVID-19 cases, or fixing the damn grid, Texas Republicans are pouring all their energy into avoiding accountability and staying in power. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: GOD BLESS OUR SOLDIERS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
Friends,
At the end of a devastating week for our country, I encourage the American people to accept the reality of the situation we are in.
We've been wishing for a different situation, wishing for a different reality for a very long time, and that got us into this mess.
We have to acknowledge that there are people out there that want to kill us, that wake up every single day, and if they have any space whatsoever, any room, any time whatsoever, they're planning an attack to kill Americans. That's the way it is and that is exactly what happened yesterday.
I wish it were different. But it's not different. And we have to acknowledge that fact. We have to acknowledge that when we made the decision to withdraw from Afghanistan, we were giving terrorists an opening to re-emerge and kill Americans.
Joe Biden has refused to acknowledge that fact, and instead made the political decision to surrender Afghanistan to terrorists. Now Americans are dead.
---
| |

| Every president since Bush has had to deal with this really difficult decision of whether to withdraw ALL troops from Afghanistan, rather than leave a residual security force to fight terrorists there so we never have to fight them here - Obama and Trump dealt with it too. But Joe Biden is the only one who really followed through with the stupidest possible option to leave the country entirely. And now we're paying in blood for it.
There's still ways to reverse course on this. There's still ways to uphold our dignity, to save our people on the ground.
These people deserve to be saved, whether they're American citizens or whether they're interpreters that I knew, that I worked with, who have done more for this country than most citizens of this country. We need to help them.
And we're not going to leave until the job is done. That has to be the first task order to the military: We're telling the Taliban we won't leave until the job is done. And if the Taliban or any other terrorist group gets in the way of our mission to get EVERY American and EVERY ally out of the country, our message to them should be simple: we will kill you.
GOD BLESS OUR SOLDIERS.
NEVER FORGET.
Dan Crenshaw

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Friends, At the end of a devastating week for our country, I encourage the American people to accept the reality of the situation we are in. We've been wishing for a different situation, wishing for a different reality for a very long time, and that got us into this mess. We have to acknowledge that there are people out there that want to kill us, that wake up every single day, and if they have any space whatsoever, any room, any time whatsoever, they're planning an attack to kill Americans. That's the way it is and that is exactly what happened yesterday. I wish it were different. But it's not different. And we have to acknowledge that fact. We have to acknowledge that when we made the decision to withdraw from Afghanistan, we were giving terrorists an opening to re-emerge and kill Americans. Joe Biden has refused to acknowledge that fact, and instead made the political decision to surrender Afghanistan to terrorists. Now Americans are dead. | | | == | == | Every president since Bush has had to deal with this really difficult decision of whether to withdraw ALL troops from Afghanistan, rather than leave a residual security force to fight terrorists there so we never have to fight them here - Obama and Trump dealt with it too. These people deserve to be saved, whether they're American citizens or whether they're interpreters that I knew, that I worked with, who have done more for this country than most citizens of this country. We need to help them. And we're not going to leave until the job is done. That has to be the first task order to the military: We're telling the Taliban we won't leave until the job is done. Peter,

Joe Biden has failed on so many accounts - where do we even begin?

He gave our enemies all around the World a great and lasting victory when he unexpectedly and inexplicably _removed our great soldiers from Afghanistan_ before taking out our U.S. citizens and allies.

He abandoned many billions of dollars of highest-grade Military equipment.

Leaving our Military till the end was such a simple decision that anyone with intelligence and common sense would have made, but he called it wrong and instantly created perhaps the **greatest embarrassment for our Country in its history** \- and it is far from over.

We need to work EVEN HARDER to **Save America** from Joe Biden and the Left, which is why I'm coming to you now. I need to know you're ready to do whatever it takes to help me put AMERICA FIRST.

name: Team Navarre
subject: Not quite fall weather
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS Stewart Navarre for Congress
body:
There’s a saying in baseball: get hot, stay hot. That also seems to be the theme of this summer as we look to close out August. It is also what our campaign hopes to do as we close in on the one-year out mark from the election. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760063/302979215/-2125818455?refcode=210827-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjdiZWEwYi01ZjA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Swhyydj6Gl9TJnf7NI9iNSB_g4A3Y-5nyVd9xjzrHM4=) Hey Peter, There’s a saying in baseball: get hot, stay hot. That also seems to be the theme of this summer as we look to close out August. It is also what our campaign hopes to do as we close in on the one-year out mark from the election. We want to make sure we keep the momentum going. **That’s why we’re trying to bring in 250 donations by the end of this month.** But in order to do that, we need to have a strong close to the summer. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760064/302979216/83917166?refcode=210827-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjdiZWEwYi01ZjA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Swhyydj6Gl9TJnf7NI9iNSB_g4A3Y-5nyVd9xjzrHM4=) **[We’re almost halfway to our fundraising goal for the end of August.
