subject: Prayers for our Service Members
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Chairman Kyle Hupfer provided the following statement on US casualties in Afghanistan. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470790?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Chairman Hupfer's Statement on Afghanistan_** Chairman Kyle Hupfer provided the following statement on US casualties in Afghanistan:
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Dog Days of Summer_** The dog days of summer aren’t slowing down your Indiana Republican Party. Just a few days ago we were finally able to gather with around 800 of our closest friends and supporters to celebrate the second term on the Holcomb-Crouch team. As I mentioned in a previous newsletter, this gala wasn’t just a celebration of the governor and lieutenant governor. It was an opportunity for all of us to get together and celebrate our shared wins of the 2020 cycle. The next day, I was honored to keynote the Bartholomew County Ice Cream Social. My son Archer even wanted to tag along; although I have a feeling it was more for the ice cream than to hear his dad speak!

As summer comes to an end, I’m excited for what the fall will bring. We’ve opened up applications for the next class of our diversity leadership series (more information is below). We’re out talking to more and more Hoosier Republicans at Lincoln Day Dinners, fairs, festivals and other events. Hoosier Republicans are building even more momentum to carry into 2022. We’re seeing the disastrous results of Democrat leadership in Washington and it couldn’t be a bigger contrast with the record of Republican results we have here in Indiana. United and working together, I know we can take back the House and Senate in DC next year!

Thanks
Kyle **_Photo: _**_Chairman Hupfer and his son Archer join Bartholomew County’s Chair Luann Welmer and Vice-Chair Josh Burnett and Burnett's son at the Bartholomew County GOP Ice Cream Social._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana for All_**
**Governor Holcomb** attended the Northwest Indiana Business Hall of Fame Luncheon to discuss all the great work that is being done in Northwest Indiana.

**Governor Holcomb** joined executives from Beck's to celebrate the completion of their new soybean tower. The facility is part of the company’s ongoing Hamilton County headquarters and production operations expansion, which was [announced in 2019](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3aea7c043b&e=1acd9bb3d6) and will create 56 new jobs by the end of 2022.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb attending the Northwest Indiana Business Hall of Fame Luncheon. Gov. Holcomb celebrating the grand opening of Beck's new soybean tower._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Hupfer: HR 4 is Just Another Power Grab**_ Chairman Hupfer, who serves as RNC General Counsel and is fighting to defend election integrity across the country, penned the following op-ed for Real Clear Politics calling out continued Demcorat efforts to subvert our elections. HR 4 is nothing short of a Demcorat Power grab.
_**"Don’t fall for their partisan lies: H.R. 4 has the same rotten core as H.R. 1 and would make our elections far less secure. H.R. 4’s goal is to eviscerate the right of states to manage their own elections with appropriate transparency and ballot-security safeguards." --Chairman Kyle Hupfer**_
You can read his entire piece here:
[https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2021/08/26/dont_be_fooled_hr_4_is_just_another_power_grab_146308.html](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1ca750aa84&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Birthday Todd!**_ This week we wished Indiana’s Marine Senator a Happy Birthday!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Bernie Sanders**_ The Indiana Republican Party issued this statement on today's scheduled visit by Socialist Vermont Senator Bernie Sanders to Tippecanoe County:
_**“In just six years, Socialist Senator Bernie Sanders has gone from gadfly backbencher to the intellectual leader of today’s Democrat Party. In those six years, today’s Democrats have embraced socialism and other radical policies like defunding the police, packing the Supreme Court, and eliminating even the most basic of election security measures. We hope Socialist Senator Sanders learns something while he’s in the Hoosier State. Like how, after 20 years of Republican leadership in Indiana we live within our means, balance our budgets, keep our tax and regulatory burdens low, and can still make record investments in education, infrastructure and public health. We hope he learns those things, but we won’t hold our breath.” **_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Diversity Series Applications**_ Applications are now open for the second class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. [Click here to apply](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e422bb4e16&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Mike Pence blasts Biden’s foreign policy humiliation in Afghanistan**_ Former Vice President Mike Pence blasted the Biden administration’s Afghanistan withdrawal as a “foreign policy humiliation.”
_**“The humiliating withdrawal that’s underway today, the complete mismanagement of the withdrawal of American forces from Afghanistan, does not take anything away from the incredible service that’s taken place over the last 20 years." -Mike Pence**_
Read the full article here: [https://www.foxnews.com/media/mike-pence-biden-foreign-policy-humiliation-afghanistan-kilmeade](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4b2fa13b8&e=1acd9bb3d6)

---
|
---

[August 27: ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07baecdcb3&e=1acd9bb3d6) IFRW Tribute to Women Dinner and State Convention
[August 28](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=51c4997b47&e=1acd9bb3d6): Brown County Republican BBQ
[August 28](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd3084ac6b&e=1acd9bb3d6): Fulton County Lincoln Day Dinner
[September 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0d7830fdb0&e=1acd9bb3d6): Noble County Republican Women Fall Rally

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Something strange is happening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Peter --

You may not know this, but the overwhelming majority of contributions to our campaign come from online donors. I’ll be the first to admit, emails like this can get annoying, but they’re a critical part of the work we’re doing to replace Ron Johnson with someone who can actually be trusted to do what's right by Wisconsin workers and families.

**Something really strange has happened though...** My campaign staff says our numbers are significantly lower than last month. Fewer people are opening these messages and even fewer are pitching in lately. I’m not surprised to hear this.

Most campaigns expect a so-called “summer slump” where their numbers dip when the weather warms up because folks are enjoying the great outdoors. That’s been especially important during this pandemic. (Max, Hartley, Tanner, and I love our walks!)

The problem is, this fundraising slump has hit us at a strange time. You see, Ron Johnson has started attacking me directly, and it’s earlier than any of us had expected. Pundits are already calling him the most vulnerable Republican incumbent, and the race was just upgraded to a toss-up -- the guy knows he’s in trouble.

It’s clear we’re making Ron Johnson nervous, Peter. One publication even said he was “scared” of me -- and honestly, he should be! I have a track record of defeating Republicans in statewide elections. I can beat him, too. But we’re about to miss our August goal, which means I need to ask you to step up today.

**[I'd really appreciate it if you could rush a donation of any amount toward our end-of-month goal ahead of the August 31 deadline. Every dollar gives us the early resources we need to build a strong campaign and fight Republican efforts to reclaim the Senate majority. You can donate here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760754/302982151/-1936136847?gpsid=50_130_20257&refcode=em21_210827_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210827_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmU0ZTdhMi02MDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rn6JtkBRI0pcn7vsop-Q08H5r0jeVKWeRITv6YSyqHs=)**

Thank you for standing with me and supporting my campaign. We’ve got a great team of people in Wisconsin ready to flip this Senate seat and give our workers and families someone they can trust to do right by them in Washington.

That’s what I intend to do as our state’s next senator -- as long as I can count on your help every step of the way, Peter. I appreciate anything you’re willing to give today.

Thanks so much.

— Sarah | Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760760/302982155/-1936136847?gpsid=50_130_20257&refcode=em21_210827_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210827_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmU0ZTdhMi02MDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rn6JtkBRI0pcn7vsop-Q08H5r0jeVKWeRITv6YSyqHs=)

clean_body: Peter -- You may not know this, but the overwhelming majority of contributions to our campaign come from online donors. I’ll be the first to admit, emails like this can get annoying, but they’re a critical part of the work we’re doing to replace Ron Johnson with someone who can actually be trusted to do what's right by Wisconsin workers and families. Something really strange has happened though... My campaign staff says our numbers are significantly lower than last month. Fewer people are opening these messages and even fewer are pitching in lately. I’m not surprised to hear this. Most campaigns expect a so-called “summer slump” where their numbers dip when the weather warms up because folks are enjoying the great outdoors. That’s been especially important during this pandemic. (Max, Hartley, Tanner, and I love our walks!) The problem is, this fundraising slump has hit us at a strange time. You see, Ron Johnson has started attacking me directly, and it’s earlier than any of us had expected. Pundits are already calling him the most vulnerable Republican incumbent, and the race was just upgraded to a toss-up -- the guy knows he’s in trouble. It’s clear we’re making Ron Johnson nervous, Peter. One publication even said he was “scared” of me -- and honestly, he should be! I have a track record of defeating Republicans in statewide elections. I can beat him, too. But we’re about to miss our August goal, which means I need to ask you to step up today. = Thank you for standing with me and supporting my campaign. We’ve got a great team of people in Wisconsin ready to flip this Senate seat and give our workers and families someone they can trust to do right by them in Washington. That’s what I intend to do as our state’s next senator -- as long as I can count on your help every step of the way, Peter. I appreciate anything you’re willing to give today. Thanks so much. — Sarah | Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

Peter, I can hardly believe we are nearing the end of this campaign.

As I look back on the incredible work we’ve done ‐‐ _knocking doors, listening to the needs of Virginia’s working families, and fighting to keep our Democratic majority alive_ ‐‐ I’m reminded of what this is all about.

**This campaign is about “we”, not me.**

[**I’ll explain in a moment, Peter, but first can I count on you to chip in $3? We’re coming up on one of our last big fundraising deadlines before Election Day, and every dollar gets us that much closer to winning this race. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760741/302982139/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210827_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU1ZTdhMi02MDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JediF6OhikmSKdO6pki3ytu46vDw22m8Sf36jtV80cM=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3, THEN KEEP READING! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760747/302982140/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210827_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU1ZTdhMi02MDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JediF6OhikmSKdO6pki3ytu46vDw22m8Sf36jtV80cM=)

As I said, Peter, this campaign is about more than just me.

I’m running to keep all Virginians in mind. Together, with our Democratic majorities, we’ve gotten so much inspiring work done ‐‐ _we expanded Medicaid, fought for gun safety reform, passed the ERA, and so much more._

**And if you elect me as Virginia’s Lt. Governor, I’ll continue this great work on behalf of you and every Virginian.**

I know the nature of my election would be historic as the first woman and first Afro‐Latina to ever hold the Lt. Governor’s office ‐‐ but this is about all of us. **It’s about how representation in government opens doors and gives us a more diverse future.**

[**So if you’re with me, Peter, I hope you will chip in just $3 to my campaign today to see this through. This isn’t a done deal, and we need to keep pushing to keep our extreme Republican opponent at bay. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34760748/302982146/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210827_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGU1ZTdhMi02MDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JediF6OhikmSKdO6pki3ytu46vDw22m8Sf36jtV80cM=)

I know it’s Friday, but I wanted to touch base with you.

This past quarter my opponent raised over half a million dollars in only a few weeks - **now I’m facing another critical fundraising deadline and I’m up against the clock.**
[
](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fedcbdd5f59e4ba9902eddbea1b342ff&_e=BXZ8yn9PPjBT4VabUumh2z6hNNrbhPhkgb8BpsH-28mqU4eiH60nWt5Ni3EVOIaQQiYtcnMrvfveFhW-DgLVYS9eafaYfaKH6NFBmdvwURNPs6TcnBWeXiCEJ-MR0UF1eWxi1SoQn-3wrZz4Im7ow5W2kiBhQ_rr2MpTovjuqMdL0LVRJugVzjoyKGgjgFjLBJd0WOLjUPWjIvsBVmND-gEHw9U_33-ZoSV04tZmcdFILD4Gap_C0FuX-X9Fc8TtocfcwRIeEi1r7wHj2FMo96YZsDSUprz-eRHCqqKK7gOxKV7L41wqGSjgmF9uLHB5_r-SrOnm7CBu43_J5pz2pDL8-u7mEDq4XeugLTvjaNceqdQAR8qR-kt3wMd7q1UkfTwBSn_t7hmCiv4XJws63rVV-XcOxXNeAfCMD4wJp7ICMnjiXJ10iK7LP4ZyODnf)

subject: The blunt truth
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34762850/302989179/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJiYWJjNC02NDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9vFHzR2cwbDk1YrEEJAYxgOTGBGAVXDs2R3LOI0Z1g=)
**[Friend, this is a long but important email about the students I serve and why I'm running to unseat Kevin McCarthy in CA-23. I hope you'll take a moment to read it, then chip in $3 to support my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34762851/302989180/-686739743?refcode=em-82721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTJiYWJjNC02NDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9vFHzR2cwbDk1YrEEJAYxgOTGBGAVXDs2R3LOI0Z1g=)**

I've been a public school teacher for 20 years here in the Central Valley.

For some families, back to school week is an exciting time.

For many others, it's a reminder of the struggle to make ends meet. I see it every year, friend. The difficulty with the cost of school supplies and clothes. Parents arranging rides for their kids because they can't leave work.

Our community struggles more than most. That's why I was so encouraged to see Democrats pass anti-poverty legislation like the expanded **child tax credit.** It may not seem like much, but that extra few hundred dollars is going a long way for the kiddos I teach.

**Friend, how a person could know our kids are struggling yet still vote against their interests is beyond me. But that's exactly what Kevin McCarthy did when he tried to crush the child tax credit in Congress. Frankly, it's inexcusable.**

Here's the blunt truth:

McCarthy is more interested in getting his hands on the Speaker's gavel than fighting for any students in our community. It's sickening, and it's time for McCarthy to go.

Our community is ready, but winning will take A TON of supporters chipping in small amounts to help us get our message out. So I need to ask:

**[I need a boost from you today, friend. Will you join the 6 supporters from your city who chipped in a contribution this week? Any amount helps defeat McCarthy, but $3 from you would go a long way. name: David Horowitz
subject: Betrayal
body:
Peter, The greatest threat to our military right now isn't Russia or China. It's Washington D.C. _It 's the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda._ It's **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** -- restructuring the Pentagon's training to revolve around the doctrines and false history of Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. It's **Bishop Garrison** -- hand selected by Secretary Austin to lead the military's purge of conservatives, Trump supporters and patriots like you and me. It's **Admiral Michael Gilday** -- pitting white sailors against nonwhite sailors, citing the works of America-hating Marxist Ibram X. Kendi. It's **General Mark Milley** -- who sided with violent Black Lives Matter terrorists that torched our cities to the ground, bowing to the Critical Race Theory dogma to keep his job when Biden took office. It's Air Force Chief of Staff **Charles Q. Brown Jr**. (a leading candidate to replace General Milley) -- betraying his own country and branch of the military as its top enlisted leader. And it's every last bureaucrat that appointed them, nominated them or enabled them. That's why the Freedom Center is joining forces with the **Lt. Col. Matthew Lohmeier** -- the whistleblower that risked everything for taking a stand against anti-American, anti-white indoctrination in our military, and paying with his career. **[And that 's why I hope I can count on your support of the Freedom Center as we exhaust every resource at our disposal to save our military, and remove the military officials working in direct opposition to our nation's values and interests.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203581:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r)** My name is David Horowitz, and when I was a young man, I dreamt of a day when our leaders embraced this backwards ideology -- because when I was a young man, I was a full fledged communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them, and revealing what I knew about them to the rest of the world. **And I can tell you beyond a shadow of a doubt that critical race theory is just Marxism by a new name, and any military official promoting it is a threat to our republic.** With your help, we can cut through this administration's lies and their media lapdogs' propaganda -- and tell the truth to the American people about what's happening to our military on _OUR_ dime. [**Will you donate $25 or more to the Freedom Center,**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203581:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r) and give us the ammunition we need to publish and distribute two original pamphlets explaining what's happening to our country in detail (one of them written by Lt. Col. Lohmeier himself), petition for the removal of treacherous leaders, and so much more? These hacks are doing our enemies' work for them, and destroying our military from the inside out. They're sending a loud clear message to the world that the United States isn't united at all, but divided by race and more vulnerable than ever. **My Freedom Center has stood proudly behind our military for over 30 years --_and that 's exactly why we're taking on their new woke leadership._** Because the twisted ideologies Joe Biden's military leadership is pushing on our men and women in uniform is putting them -- and our country -- in immense danger. **[But as a nonprofit organization, we won 't succeed without patriots like you by our side.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203581:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r)** This administration and everyone associated with it projects weakness, fragility and cowardice, and our enemies are circling like vultures. Without a strong military, we're at the mercy of our adversaries. Without a strong military, there is no America. And without America, there is no hope. _" If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth." _ _\-- Ronald Reagan_ I hope I can count on your generous support today. Sincerely, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203581:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r) David Horowitz P.S. Col. Matthew Lohmeier risked everything to reveal the truth to the American people about how top military officials are sabotaging our men and women in uniform, and now he's teaming up with my Freedom Center to release one of the most important pamphlets of the decade. [**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more to the Freedom Center today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203581:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r) [**SUPPORT THE FREEDOM CENTER**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203581:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203582:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r) The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support the Freedom Center](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203582:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r)** (C) David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org
P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203583:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203584:JIZEgj2Nf:m:1:3253819041:F8F108A1130E092754ADEDB4D1474162:r)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Women’s Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wfKF2vqZIxzDJepwnbxZnDr9ABe69wzWMWVpcT5VUW0=/inHN_WDBs07FC-Xr1TYS-kUFeZW6OJOyXN798KBFHAc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210827-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter -- Yesterday was Women's Equality Day!

The holiday marks the passing of the 19th amendment. Upon its passage in 1920, women were granted the right to vote, and in honor of this historic amendment, Congress, in 1973, designated August 26th Women's Equality Day.

When I was first elected in 2018, I came to Congress with a historic freshman class. Our group of new members included more women than ever before. Now, some of my closest friends are other women who joined me in Congress in 2018!

**Since then, the number of women in Congress has increased -- 143 women now serve in the U.S. Congress.**

But in celebrating Women's Equality Day, I also remember the amazing women who paved the way for women's rights and the pursuit of equality.

[_**I hope that in honor of this holiday, you 'll consider contributing to my campaign. Each day as I work to advance women's rights, I am grateful for the women who came before me, and I'm excited to see who comes after me!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/wfKF2vqZIxzDJepwnbxZnDr9ABe69wzWMWVpcT5VUW0=/inHN_WDBs07FC-Xr1TYS-kUFeZW6OJOyXN798KBFHAc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210827-1-EM&amount=25)

clean_body: | | Peter -- Yesterday was Women's Equality Day! The holiday marks the passing of the 19th amendment. Upon its passage in 1920, women were granted the right to vote, and in honor of this historic amendment, Congress, in 1973, designated August 26th Women's Equality Day. When I was first elected in 2018, I came to Congress with a historic freshman class. Our group of new members included more women than ever before. Now, some of my closest friends are other women who joined me in Congress in 2018! Since then, the number of women in Congress has increased -- 143 women now serve in the U.S. Congress. But in celebrating Women's Equality Day, I also remember the amazing women who paved the way for women's rights and the pursuit of equality. | Thank you for your support, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. Fellow Conservative,

When I announced that I was running for the U.S. Senate, I made what I thought was a benign statement. **I simply said in America you should be able to raise a family on one income.**

I didn't think it was that controversial, but it goes to show that Democrats are more concerned with _"Wokeism"_ than actually improving the lives of Americans.

**It shouldn't be hard to raise a family in America, but stale politicians and toxic progressive ideas have failed our communities.** They have sold us out to major corporations, overregulated small businesses, and drove the cost of living through the roof

Democrats have made it almost impossible to get ahead in America, and they are okay with that. [**At this point, only an outsider can fix their damage. That's why I decided to jump in the race to unseat Mark Kelly.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=331ec0c58a9e4e0291d10de2ac2f2e51&_e=SRdZKDPvx4BG_Lpqd2zg7gKUTSkwGWjEvJ_qlOodan9e_si5iobyDRiKnC501vhnqZ9zNQ4ZUpwTedG6kuFRfXCLBdUOU2kkdZDQKUEBwUd2q_h-Uf2Nrx0fs2OyILivVTrNwVqWU5i3M89Mmp3XOkz6aeymJTprN0wgYpF-xJakaUWC5ilge2RhvdkpCvQMNpfFq8lU03hNpyncvErwzFpYy4ZIkX2vA0szXwU7RABrlf1W32jCtIxQR-MrxVKW2-6IFAIqOSqV6cEdmewy3UeSGWB4Ncc4KiQSn77CjbQKfPS7Pqb4hP0vjsFUMK7kTrRLxn5ipiNqr8CdLvp3q-C8I7vnRAMSi6RA86Wv-XSctRwbddV8bGrdp3sbloRjyXlOuZHMSygpIwfdj4wrxyFbYc-T9fX4sY0SdLWbsgirbAM6eE9iWm1LoQHP1DHH)

clean_body: It shouldn't be hard to raise a family in America, but stale politicians and toxic progressive ideas have failed our communities. | Fellow Conservative, When I announced that I was running for the U.S. Senate, I made what I thought was a benign statement. I simply said in America you should be able to raise a family on one income. I didn't think it was that controversial, but it goes to show that Democrats are more concerned with "Wokeism" than actually improving the lives of Americans. It shouldn't be hard to raise a family in America, but stale politicians and toxic progressive ideas have failed our communities. They have sold us out to major corporations, overregulated small businesses, and drove the cost of living through the roof Democrats have made it almost impossible to get ahead in America, and they are okay with that. - | | | ---|---|--- My wife and I have three small boys; I know what it's like to have a young family in 2021. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Peter, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
We’re looking at a fall filled with fights in Congress and the beginning of primary season.
#
Peter,
Supporters to Pramila’s campaign this month gave an average of $19.67 when donating through emails just like this one. Small-dollar, grassroots donations like these keep Pramila fighting for a more progressive Congress and a more just, equitable America. **[Can you add a $19.67 donation today towards our $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal? We need a lot of folks to give what they can, so we can keep powering Pramila’s progressive fight into this pivotal fall and beyond.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4976?refcode=em20210827-578&t=1&akid=578%2E420207%2ENEq9aD)**
We’re looking at a fall filled with fights in Congress, AND the beginning of primary season. **Our progressive agenda will be on the line** as Pramila pushes forward voting rights, climate action, immigration reform, canceling student debt, a wealth tax, Medicare expansion, child care, paid leave, and more. That’s _a lot_. And there’s very little time to waste if we are going to deliver for the people.
Pramila will also have her eyes on Democratic primaries and the consequential 2022 midterms. Democrats are going to have tough fights on our hands AND progressives are going to have opportunities to get more fighters in Congress who are there for the people, not corporate interests.
**[The more our small-dollar supporters fund Pramila’s fight, the more work we can do for the progressive movement. So, can you chip in today towards our August goal? Not a cent comes from corporate PACs, and we know corporations will spend any amount to maintain the broken status quo.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4976?refcode=em20210827-578&t=21&akid=578%2E420207%2ENEq9aD)**
**[Add your contribution »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4976?refcode=em20210827-578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=578%2E420207%2ENEq9aD)**
This movement is powered by people — not corporate PACs — giving what they can, not only because of the transformative change we are fighting for with Pramila but also because of the future we want to build in our communities.
That’s why the average email donation to Pramila’s campaign is just $19.67 this month. And it’s why we rely on each and every person reading this to do their part. [**If you can, chip in $19.67, $3, or anything at all to power Pramila’s progressive fight into the fall, the midterms, and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210827?refcode=em20210827-578&t=23&refcode2=578_420207_NEq9aD&akid=578%2E420207%2ENEq9aD)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Court Ruling on School Masking
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

The 2nd Judicial Circuit Court of Florida just overturned the Governor's indefensible, illegal executive order stripping the power of local school boards to implement a temporary mask mandate with
medical opt out.

This is a win for students, parents, teachers, and democracy.

This most recent surge in COVID cases has overwhelmed our healthcare system, even leading to concerns about oxygen shortages. Children have been hospitalized at alarming rates.

Allowing school districts to require masks isn’t about politics. It’s about keeping our children safe and trusting local officials to make the right decisions when it comes to the health and safety of our kids.

Make no mistake — our fight is far from over. DeSantis will appeal this court decision. He’s willing to put our children at risk to score political points. That’s why throughout this crisis, I’ve stepped up to do his job for him, delivering clear information and standing with students, parents, and teachers around Florida.

I’m doing everything above and beyond my position as Commissioner of Agriculture and Consumer Services because in times of crisis, you deserve support from your leaders and you deserve the facts.

This is a difficult moment for Florida and for our country, but I know we can get through this. Thanks for all you’re doing to keep your friends and neighbors safe.

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-op-ed-emailaug]

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Jasmine Beach-Ferrara
subject: Madison Cawthorn's appalling response to Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34766426/303000751/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWE0ZTMwNy02ZTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuWNv0j-70ZoCkpk9fO1W82BgtMFvJWMVamfRSlm3wA=)

| | Given the devastating news out of Afghanistan and Madison Cawthorn’s callous, appalling stunt in response, I wanted to share my thoughts with you: Yesterday 13 U.S. troops and estimates of more than 170 Afghans were killed in a suicide attack at the Kabul airport. At least 200 more people were wounded. I am heartbroken for the families of all who were lost and injured, and with the August 31 evacuation deadline approaching we need to focus on helping as many people as possible safely evacuate. This is a time when our communities and nation need to be pulling together. Instead Madison Cawthorn chose to launch an outrageous call for our Vice President to invoke the 25th Amendment and remove President Biden from office. And he’s doing this at a time when Western North Carolina desperately needs steady, compassionate leadership. Families across Western NC have been devastated by the recent flooding, and hospital beds across the region are filling up yet again due to the spread of the Delta variant. In response to these crises, we are seeing tremendous resilience, grit and compassion on display - and that’s exactly what we need more of. We need elected leaders at every level helping community members access emergency assistance and the resources to stay healthy, recover and rebuild. That’s why I am so deeply troubled that Madison Cawthorn is using this moment to pull an immature, outlandish partisan stunt attacking President Biden. I don’t want to give what he is doing even more attention, but he is once again betraying the people and values of Western North Carolina. To use the tragedy in Afghanistan as a way to try to generate headlines on Fox and Newsmax is an abuse of the power and platform of his elected position. We deserve leaders who will show up to help in a crisis and who understand the gravity and sorrow of this time, not a representative who saw the loss of life and unspeakable grief and chose to play-act for the cameras. \-- Jasmine
---

**FIRST:** Republicans narrowed our House Majority to a **RAZOR-THIN** _five seat_ margin.

**THEN:** A top GOP group announced they'd be spending nearly **$900,000** to unseat 23 of our most vulnerable House Democrats -- enough to obliterate our House Majority!

Can we count on you and your $3 to protect our House Democrats straight away?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBe6Nz-)**

name: NCGOP.org
subject: unbelievable media bias
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
The “media” is a propaganda arm of the Democratic Party.

| Peter, Everyone knows that the Fake News Media has a strong, left-wing bias. They’re completely and totally in the tank for the Democrats, and no serious Republican should take what they say at face value. But their coverage of Joe Biden’s failures over the past two weeks have been completely unacceptable -- far worse than usual. Does anyone doubt that, if President Trump was in office right now, the media would be doing wall-to-wall negative coverage? clean_body: The “media” is a propaganda arm of the Democratic Party. | Peter, Everyone knows that the Fake News Media has a strong, left-wing bias. They’re completely and totally in the tank for the Democrats, and no serious Republican should take what they say at face value. But their coverage of Joe Biden’s failures over the past two weeks have been completely unacceptable -- far worse than usual. Does anyone doubt that, if President Trump was in office right now, the media would be doing wall-to-wall negative coverage? Instead, their comparative silence makes them complicit in Biden’s failures. If Republican Patriots want to get the truth out to the American people, we need to build our own methods of direct communication (like this email). We can’t trust the media to be honest and impartial. | FIGHT THE FAKE NEWS MEDIA EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | | | | | | The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to maintain their strangehold on power in Washington -- and the media are Democrats. Don’t assume they’re unbiased. That’s a lie. Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

So please, Peter: ❌ DON’T get coffee ❌ DON’T watch TV ❌ DON’T delete this email | Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans Digital Team

name: Karrin Taylor Robson
subject: Peter, Biden has blood on his hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karrin for Arizona
body:
|
Dear Peter,

Right now, we all need to pray for those who have been injured and killed by the terrorist attacks in Kabul. This is a horrific attack of despicable evil by those who would bring harm to evacuees and US service members.

But let's not forget why this is happening:

Joe Biden's _**WEAKNESS**_ has gotten American service members and Afghan children murdered in the streets.

Joe Biden's _**WEAKNESS**_ has led to the rise of the Taliban and ISIS in Afghanistan.

Joe Biden's _**WEAKNESS**_ has led to former Guantanamo Bay terrorist prisoners being freed from prisons in abandoned US military bases.
**Joe Biden has made us less safe. I'm calling on him to resign immediately.**
During a time when our southern border is open and the cartels are bringing in the thousands by the day - _how long will it be until ISIS fighters and terrorists find their way into Arizona?_ The radical left and Joe Biden advocate for an open border policy that jeopardizes the safety of Arizonans -- it's a welcome mat to drug cartels, traffickers and now, terrorists wishing to do us harm.

As your next Governor, I will lock down and surge the border with the National Guard to defend every citizen of Arizona and prevent terrorists from entering our country. I will lead the fight against Joe Biden and the radical left's open border policies. _But I need your help._

At this critical time to send a message, [**can you chip into my campaign to guarantee we have leadership that will defend Arizona 's southern border from those who will cause this country harm?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203821:J5JKsN2gN:m:1:3253819041:C56FA62B0A8A0890BFC0B26A715A20C3:r)
**[DONATE HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203821:J5JKsN2gN:m:1:3253819041:C56FA62B0A8A0890BFC0B26A715A20C3:r)** Yesterday was a dark day for America, internationally. We need to keep every innocent person in Kabul in our prayers.
God bless,

Karrin Taylor Robson
_Candidate for Governor_

| Paid for by Karrin for Arizona
Authorized by Karrin for Arizona
---

2211 East Highland #210
Phoenix, AZ 85106
---

[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203822:J5JKsN2gN:m:1:3253819041:C56FA62B0A8A0890BFC0B26A715A20C3:r)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent Alert: Find a protest near you on Saturday!
body:
| |
---
Have you checked our website lately to see if there is a **Just Say No** protest happening near you tomorrow, on Saturday (or in the coming week)?

If not, [**please go to our website right now**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjM5LTkzYTdlZDBiZDhlYjQwNzA4ZmI0ZDg3NTUyMWQzNDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MjQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=VermYdZBXAB3vIMCTyNAzQ) to see if there is a protest you can attend! If you can, please RSVP on our site as well by filling out the form at the bottom of the page, and choosing the “I will attend” option.

**Just Say No** is the theme, and we are saying no to unAmerican medical mandates – no to forced masking, no to vaccine mandates and passports, and no to lockdowns. Instead, we are saying yes to freedom and liberty.

There is no time to lose. Australia has gone mad, while Sweden and Denmark lead the way on treating the people as citizens and not subjects.

Which nation will the United States follow? Furthermore, why should we follow when we can lead? Let’s show the world how it’s done, and how people fight for freedom and win.

Please find a protest near you today at [**www.StopMedicalMandates.com**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjM5LTkzYTdlZDBiZDhlYjQwNzA4ZmI0ZDg3NTUyMWQzNDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MjQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=MJctbsD9NV_GZe7_TnQPiw)**,** and be there tomorrow! Be sure to send your photographs and/or videos to [photos@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:photos@teapartypatriots.org) so we can spread the message of **Just Say No!**
_If you will not fight for right when you can easily win without bloodshed; if you will not fight when your victory is sure and not too costly; you may come to the moment when you will have to fight with all the odds against you and only a precarious chance of survival. There may even be a worse case. You may have to fight when there is no hope of victory, because it is better to perish than to live as slaves._
\- Winston Churchill
In liberty,

The Tea Party Patriots Action Support Team
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjM5LTkzYTdlZDBiZDhlYjQwNzA4ZmI0ZDg3NTUyMWQzNDI2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00NDI0MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jorWQXsyvfR3lyUZAmQi1Q)

Our movement is bigger than Ohio. | **_[This is an email about why our campaign’s success is so important. If you’re already with us for the long haul, chip in right now, then read my message below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34767118/303005111/-606200675?refcode=em_JC_FR_EOM1_082721_l1&amount=25&refcode2=50e6f361-7107-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGU2ZjM2MS03MTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHpTR0QgwV8HZ37Q18Jo9CF1KoRHhumSK0dznMyQR5M=)_** Our campaign is about more than just Ohio, friend. **It’s about advancing bold ideas** — the kind of bold ideas that will bring Ohio back, like legalizing marijuana to invest the revenue into our infrastructure. **It’s about recognizing that there’s nothing more important than creating a better future for our children.** We _must_ do what it takes to protect our planet, like revitalizing our economy through clean energy advancements. **And it’s about proving that corruption and cronyism don’t have to win** — that the voice of the people will _always_ be more powerful than the special interests or corporations that try to buy politicians to do their bidding. clean_body: Our movement is bigger than Ohio. | = Our campaign is about more than just Ohio, friend. It’s about advancing bold ideas — the kind of bold ideas that will bring Ohio back, like legalizing marijuana to invest the revenue into our infrastructure. It’s about recognizing that there’s nothing more important than creating a better future for our children. We must do what it takes to protect our planet, like revitalizing our economy through clean energy advancements. And it’s about proving that corruption and cronyism don’t have to win — that the voice of the people will always be more powerful than the special interests or corporations that try to buy politicians to do their bidding. Our campaign is bigger than me or my staff. It’s built by grassroots supporters like you, and together, I know we can come out on top. But I need you with me right now, friend, because just a few days out from our campaign’s first end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re still behind track on our $15,000 goal. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for the help, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. name: Erica Smith
subject: I used to teach high school math. What grade should I give the Republicans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
A, B, C, D, or F
#
What grade does the GOP deserve? **[Select a grade:](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385&t=1&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)**
**[A](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-A&t=2&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [B](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-B&t=3&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [C](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-C&t=4&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [D](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-D&t=5&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [F](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-F&t=6&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)**
---
I used to teach high school math: Algebra, geometry, and calculus. So let me tell you, I’ve graded a LOT of tests over the years.
When an entire class takes a test, the majority of students usually earn A, B, and C grades. Luckily, I didn’t have many D students or F students because my pupils studied HARD.
**The only time I really gave out a failing F grade was if I caught someone plagiarizing.** In my classroom, any cheating resulted in an automatic F!
That’s exactly what I think of when I look at the GOP today.
**The GOP is CHEATING — cheating our working families out of opportunities and urgent changes that would improve our lives!**
From insurrectionist Rep. Madison Cawthorne, to outgoing Senator Richard Burr, to our Trump-endorsed Senate opponent, Republicans will stop at NOTHING to put corporate interests ahead of things like a $15 minimum wage and climate action.
[**_So please let me know: What grade would you give the GOP right now? Click a grade below to record your answer. Over the weekend I’ll review all the responses I receive!_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385&t=7&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)
**[A](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-A&t=8&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [B](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-B&t=9&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [C](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-C&t=10&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [D](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-D&t=11&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9) [F](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/gop-survey/?source=em20210827-385-F&t=12&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)**
Looking forward to seeing your grade,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210827-385-footer&t=13&refcode2=385_3698_B43YO9&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=14&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=385%2E3698%2EB43YO9)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

| | Hi Peter!

Did you see this email from Mike?

The California election is right around the corner and here’s why Mike plans to vote “No”.

[**_Will you let us know if you plan to vote “NO” on September 14th?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34768254/303009832/-1807511792?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210827_1_1&refcode2=6800eee4-7307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAwZWVlNC03MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwktxl6j-vXvWLPX02-8hEionhfDWwQudCh6Jhia-kc=&emci=94993aa6-5707-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6800eee4-7307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)

Don’t forget to make a plan to vote!

Thanks,

Team Thompson

**_\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---_**

Peter,

I’m sure you’re aware that on September 14th, California is taking part in a recall election that could result in removing Governor Newsom. This process was put into place 110 years ago to hold corrupt politicians accountable — and today, it’s become an abuse of power. That’s why I’m voting NO to recall Governor Newsom.

Thanks to Governor Newsom, we’ve powered through three tragic and devastating fire seasons, we’ve been at the forefront for tackling climate change, and he’s guided us through a deadly pandemic.

[**_The recall is a flawed and antiquated system — and we need your help. Will you please add your name now if you plan to vote “NO” on September 14th?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34768255/303009833/-1807511792?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210827_1_1&refcode2=6800eee4-7307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAwZWVlNC03MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwktxl6j-vXvWLPX02-8hEionhfDWwQudCh6Jhia-kc=&emci=94993aa6-5707-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6800eee4-7307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)
**[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34768256/303009834/-1807511792?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210827_1_1&refcode2=6800eee4-7307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODAwZWVlNC03MzA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwktxl6j-vXvWLPX02-8hEionhfDWwQudCh6Jhia-kc=&emci=94993aa6-5707-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6800eee4-7307-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)**
Here’s what you need to know:
* The Voter Registration deadline is this Monday, August 30th
* Election Day is Tuesday, September 14th
* Polls will be open from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM
* We need every voter to turn out and vote NO!

Peter, the choice here is simple. We must ensure that Governor Newsom is able to continue leading our great state as we build back from this pandemic. I hope you’ll join me in making a plan to vote NO!

Please be sure to talk to your family and friends and help them develop a plan to mail in their ballots or vote NO on election day.

Thank you for your support,

Mike Thompson

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Bad news, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends, we have a big problem, so I won't sugarcoat it: **My campaign fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal and now we're behind in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Republicans are favored to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell in next year's election, and it's clear why: they only have to flip one seat – and they’ve made me and Mark Kelly their top targets.
**In fact, National Republicans have already started running ads to attack us in Georgia and Arizona. That's why we have to close this budget shortfall immediately – so I have to ask:[Can you split an urgent contribution of $5 or more right now between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to help us defend these seats and hold the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-aug21?refcode=em210827-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1193_6688874_zDJ23O&akid=1193%2E6688874%2EzDJ23O)**
While Mark and I have spent our time in office fighting to beat this virus, get pandemic relief to struggling families and get our economy back on track, Republicans have been dead set on attacking us ahead of the 2022 midterms.
Now their mega donors are funneling millions into dark-money groups, spending whatever it takes to try and flip our seats, retake control of the Senate, and block our agenda at every turn. So we cannot accept this missed fundraising goal – or any missed goals going forward. **In a race this important, every single dollar counts.**
**Every minute we waste by not hitting our goal is another minute we give the GOP to mobilize against us. So please, friend, I have to ask:[Will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s so we can defend these seats and hold the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-aug21?refcode=em210827-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1193_6688874_zDJ23O&akid=1193%2E6688874%2EzDJ23O)**
Thank you so much,
— Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1193%2E6688874%2EzDJ23O).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: FWD: 📝Take the Survey: 2021 American Priorities 🇺🇸

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203962:J2LzkN2Nt:m:1:3253819041:6A71D57A6909B7E9421EA66631012FA5:r) Peter: The U.S. Senate authorized $4 Trillion of spending in less than 24 hours - most of it voted on in the early morning hours when they hoped nobody would be paying attention. This is simply an unprecedented waste of taxpayer money, all while inflation reaches a 20-year high. If you aren't disgusted by what Joe Biden and the liberals are doing to this nation, you can delete this message - **_you and I aren 't going to agree on much if we don't agree on that._** I voted NAY on both bills, but with a one-vote majority, the Democrats were able to send these bills to Nancy Pelosi, and we both know that we aren't going to get any fiscal discipline from her. **[If you want to ensure we have a nation not saddled with debt to leave our children or have the threat from China on our back, stand with me and fight to defeat Joe Biden's latest scam on the American people.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203962:J2LzkN2Nt:m:1:3253819041:6A71D57A6909B7E9421EA66631012FA5:r "If you want to

Biden’s latest scam on the American people.")** **I saw it coming, and[I was screaming about it to my colleagues.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203962:J2LzkN2Nt:m:1:3253819041:6A71D57A6909B7E9421EA66631012FA5:r "I was screaming about it to my colleagues.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203962:J2LzkN2Nt:m:1:3253819041:6A71D57A6909B7E9421EA66631012FA5:r "Video") _This video is from DAYS before the massive bill was passed._ _**[See for yourself.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58203962:J2LzkN2Nt:m:1:3253819041:6A71D57A6909B7E9421EA66631012FA5:r "See for yourself.")**_ For months, we've heard that the "infrastructure" bill would pay for itself. **_That was a lie._** **Fortunately, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office exposed the facts --their "infrastructure bill" will cause Americans at least $250,000,000,000 in new debt.** We were told the bill would focus on rebuilding our nation's crumbling roads and bridges. **_That was a lie._** **When the infrastructure bill was released, we discovered that a section of the bill included language from the "Equality Act" that redefined "sex."** **_No more lies._** I will not stop fighting, and I will not allow them to lie to us anymore. name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: "The House Has Passed A Bill To Restore The Voting Rights Act"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
NPR: The House Has Passed A Bill To Restore The Voting Rights Act "House lawmakers approved new legislation aimed at protecting the right to vote on Tuesday, amid a wave of restrictive new elections laws from Republican-controlled state legislatures." - August 24, 2021 | **_NPR_ : The House Has Passed A Bill To Restore The Voting Rights Act**

"House lawmakers approved new legislation aimed at protecting the right to vote on Tuesday, amid a wave of restrictive new elections laws from Republican-controlled state legislatures." - August 24, 2021
---
Peter,

In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have followed Donald Trump's attacks on our democracy by introducing a record-breaking number of bills to restrict the right to vote. After losing the House, Senate, and White House, they're resorting to attacking our right to vote in order to win in 2022.

Protecting our democracy will always be a priority for Kim. **That's why earlier this week, Kim voted to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, a bill which she was an original co-sponsor of.**

subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I hope you'll stick with me.

Let that sink in. Thirty years ago, scientists warned us about global warming -- and most lawmakers failed to see the urgency. Now, those decades of inaction are coming back to bite us. Hard. Washington, D.C. may be dragging its feet on climate action, but Washington state is making strides: Just this year, we've passed a historic new Clean Fuel Standard and a cap-and-invest program, which will curtail our greenhouse gas emissions over the coming years.
That's exactly what the IPCC report tells us we need to do.
But there's more work ahead, and I hope you'll stick with me for it. Every dollar we raise now will fuel our work as we continue to raise the standard for bold climate action.

Will you chip in before our August 31 deadline to keep this movement going?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXsV2r80hb/MTFzU0tQSm43VHloNzA1VWY3amROMlI2MWxvSVlCQnJhOWcyN051bjBWdkQ5aHQ5dG9Md2NaSGdDdXkzL0xtTW4yUUxsQ1ZyMkJLRlBhK2ZRckNyWXF2T2RvRUJ3dGVmTERYMlo1dVp2TWc9S0/T0pYaGxCcWpRVDFiZmpzaW5EeHVrY0tLUkJaTllXNXh5amtpVUVJMUVndz0S1)

Jay

name: John Castorani
subject: a note from an Afghan vet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Yesterday, 13 courageous U.S. Service Members gave the ultimate sacrifice and laid down their lives in defense of the people of Afghanistan. |
---

Fellow Conservative,

Yesterday, 13 courageous U.S. Service Members gave the ultimate sacrifice and laid down their lives in defense of the people of Afghanistan. As veterans, Krissy and myself are deeply saddened and our prayers are with the Gold Star families and the families of the Afghan citizens killed in the heinous attack conducted by the Islamic State-Khorasan (ISIS-K). We ask that all Americans remember their sacrifice and know that they saved countless lives and evacuated thousands of refugees seeking protection from terrorist organizations like the Taliban and ISIS-K, their sacrifices will not be in vain!

Under President Biden's "leadership" or lack thereof, we have seen the undoing of half a century of Foreign Policy and National Security in just seven short months. Democrats are laughing during classified security briefings on Afghanistan while the Taliban dictates who we evacuate and the deadline for doing such. We are the greatest fighting force the world has ever known - we do not allow anyone or any entity to dictate how, when or if we evacuate our citizens in extremis.

Our anger is not misplaced, what is happening absolutely makes my blood boil, I did not sacrifice my time away from family, risk my life and lose my friends so that a feckless leader can hand over Afghanistan to a declared terrorist organization, one that can keep Americans from getting to the airport yet cannot seem to keep out ISIS-K suicide bombers - which I remind you, in August the Afghanistan temperatures can reach 100F+ therefore making it extremely difficult to conceal an explosive vest.

**_We are at a crossroads, America_** ; the Democrats are destroying everything, it began with burning cities last summer now while having full control of both chambers of Congress they are destroying everything we stand for, they are destroying our foreign partnerships and they are abandoning U.S. citizens. We can take control before it's too late and it starts right here in Virginia's 7th Congressional District, my race will be absolutely pivotal to regaining control of the House.

God Bless,
John Castorani

**_If you’re a Veteran struggling with thoughts of suicide or know a Veteran who is struggling, call the Veterans Crisis Line at 800-273-8255 and press 1, text 838255, or chat online at[VeteransCrisisLine.net/chat.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=edcf2feaa79948b381b8907e8247f454&_e=KerLsNBKKw2VTafgVVwfkvwgNj9KQD98GFO0X0nVgM5irZrQ9RR2MLtAAYoWsWRQIx9QgRzV1YDN-7hLfqVEjnIpjhVJ_LCiHiW7D4fzvDuFgLd7vDDX0Bx7FFsJVbZ8ALtaKI6k1S1TmLEAKKJOM46_B10geKYA-HmPE3N9opr-iDOVXasE6mWBykfIQakvgf0xH55n9VknHRfrUOa1ub2aj0IGOvn65MtGmmmliVGKDD8j-fUoB6s3sorHoRjWBIGydh8yomXv0M0GsarimAijfjUoimTgqIgQo3UWEWM%3D) _**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=edcf2feaa79948b381b8907e8247f454&_t=S2baLFqHFUhKFxi_nHxt_ka8jLMKC1NUyygGj7akbbhKJwoOawHX6FkvsM59EpDW1YuB8Oucaohb2bZS6r0CqhmumfkNcw7FTrRFajXjkta2wcCi1n5I4ic8HNNv8j6k7xt-g3cI_p2GRqRR94X-2x1n4biT5n5nXu1tiJxSt9w%3D)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: personal message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c300%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lo2%2fcEJDg5poGp3GmKPVPA&sysid=1)
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65280%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zh%2fkVFffvAJm9ALJ8NeGKA&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65281%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5jxFa4flVI4IHy3IgpeWUA&sysid=1)**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65282%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B%2bsuKTtJo66h00n7bTdsuA&sysid=1)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65283%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HjJsiKkK27PHFeBdPRxWCg&sysid=1) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65284%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LFtXokpyUguqrfjjYsK5DQ&sysid=1)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65295%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=laNNkyhIm0bvAb9nU2YUog&sysid=1)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65296%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2TcnPHnUexCN7Lgb%2f1jOng&sysid=1)

[
](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65297%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E09zOWpRvFTGu%2fPPUoaG7Q&sysid=1)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c300%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lo2%2fcEJDg5poGp3GmKPVPA&sysid=1)_

|

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c300%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lo2%2fcEJDg5poGp3GmKPVPA&sysid=1)

body:
Michael’s focused on the work ahead. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34771489/303019582/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM3M2I0Ny03ZTA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bifz-R6kLozQOvB2B6ZdSdq2iErhNhJBOB0z5B8TEdk=)

Climate change is already affecting our country, and creating devastating storms, droughts, and fires that endanger all of us. But despite that, Ron Johnson still thinks climate change is “bullsht.” = = We’re not going to sugarcoat it: Climate change is one of the biggest threats to our way of life, and we need to act now to mitigate the bad outcomes. While Democrats are hard at work passing historic legislation to tackle climate change, Ron Johnson voted against the historic bipartisan infrastructure bill and is planning on voting against historic funding to fight climate change. We need someone who understands the science and danger of climate change, and that’s why we’re doing everything we can to defeat Ron Johnson next year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: Rick Larsen
subject: Yesterday in Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34772075/303021018/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGU2MDEzZS04MDA3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBNzzxPboOrotb3D-qzo0W4tW-EYE1JG2UELIIz-Cek=&emci=05163e9b-7d07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=00e6013e-8007-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Yesterday in Afghanistan, an explosion killed dozens of people — including 13 American servicemembers. The central Asian branch of the Islamic State (ISIS-K) has claimed responsibility. This terrorist attack is as sickening as it is horrific. The American response to this attack needs to be tactical and proportional. But our mission will continue. Afghanistan is America's longest war. And after nearly 20 years, it is time to leave. The evacuations of Americans, our allies, and of those Afghans who aided our cause will be completed — no matter how long it takes. My congressional office is working around the clock to ensure that Americans and allied Afghans with ties to Northwest Washington make it out. We have had 20 open cases representing roughly 80 people – in my district alone. My heart breaks for the families of those killed in this latest attack. We must honor their sacrifice by finishing the mission for which they gave their lives. _Rick_ |
---|---|---
