name: Bruno Amato
subject: FWD: The news out of Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | |
---
This is a sad and sobering time for thousands of veterans and Afghans who dealt with an occupation that had no end in sight. This morning, I made time to watch the press conference given by Kevin McCarthy in response to the attacks and to President Biden’s speech. Folks, every single minute I watched the press conference, I grew more frustrated. Throughout the press conference, he could not keep his story straight. McCarthy first said he supported the removal of troops and then said he supported keeping troops in Afghanistan. He tore into President Biden for supposedly negotiating with the Taliban, though President Trump did the same exact thing earlier this year and faced none of the same criticism from McCarthy. How do we believe anything he says when he changes opinions based on where the political winds are blowing? Folks, I’m not trying to equivocate the behavior between Biden and Trump here. I’m a U.S. Navy vet and I know this war in Afghanistan had no point, no solution, no end game. There was never going to be a clear outcome, folks. Veterans of Afghanistan have made the same points. We cannot continue endless wars. **Here are some resources I want to share for veterans and those looking to support Afghan refugees:**
* [If you’re a veteran in need of urgent mental health support, click here to visit the Veterans Crisis Line website for resources on a free 24/7 confidential live chat and phone line.
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDAop7dNOOpxXZrUvdOyovtppS9VhI9pXJG-H68nz7s3LkJ5HNS4AqHh33_U-96ZqAgf5JVVOBfJIfQAHp--EdtvY-FVVWNUEGh-UeKA9qkwJ4MnYOJZjpf5vAhm3LYyBnR9T1PrTGykW5HfoFcT4S6hh9of3CNh1QBob0Hw28vu5PEUak3NQpbYatEFpQvcNRhJrMYYmWOAXOJ9OP-VeX6IsnufWQgCHcZxD5lWhsx2jnKOGy1ZSUbhJids_sTvC6qy7XUAJXgSmQHXtqlNmOE4/3et/dox31kOgS8iwqY4prkEmSQ/h0/lIfz_2VI0WcTMCEHHPVXqJSBlmiehthW0jl1i0H9X2A)
* [If you would like to contribute to help Afghan evacuees obtain necessary food, housing, and other needs as they await official resources, click here to give via Lutheran Immigration and Refugee Services.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOv4zKV58ncQWIruLR2f5JWDqNMqqqF_h98MgztVLVcH7Vh9RMBEMWq9B-c569ZPPwHYedznPc-qNucSLezpxsysk2nDNsRNZMFPBfYDlLeoiatDV8GuigLbm8mBFVFhaHI1eAVdv0wF_u3CPHw8ReakcHQax9PWSzd6ol_nKmJOsY62ga34CuaeE1nIS6SJ4SLSLwmZJNZRzncoiGlVt4sGY-fqXk9lkOB-O6M35gK5kYuhfflL38UkEvYaQznY09DGDRGTUPpg3FPyzRnfmrfLtSUcMrvsSqVKLoSzZX0NVI0i3grIMM-u_LgnwliiDLP_gXOfwKZf6z_JtKg7EPY/3et/dox31kOgS8iwqY4prkEmSQ/h1/J56UyqngKacz-DX-AfSana4fnji-_dmDUP2jNxZi7Ys)

None of us may know exactly how removal would have gone, no matter who was Commander in Chief. Those who can pull the levers of power in Congress have responsibility, too**. McCarthy said he supported the removal of troops but has voted repeatedly to keep them there. He voted against expanding and expediting the visa process for Afghan interpreters just last month.** He holds responsibility, no matter how much he denies it. **My views here have always been clear, folks**. I do not support endless war. I do not support occupations against people in other countries that are done for our own unclear interests. It is not honoring our service members to send them into an endless conflict with an enormous amount of danger involved. If we can defeat Kevin McCarthy, the Central Valley and this country can count on me to always act on my convictions and do what is right for the people who I serve. We cannot afford to have someone who changes his mind on these critical issues every 30 seconds. We deserve better. In solidarity, Bruno Amato

[Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoXfKc7Hvgf5m9FTYuJ1OdZ4XVIdU1FYHxDh-ur__Ud-AecS9s_bmXSzNFTxc04uRP-65gJFL2HRs9eDK3PyEwP-BHtnU-MDv41IwCSWMdNMKa2g3UQgZ5_2DyEPhJjiW3Fn4MA-AC3eNl9Q87NhYwUn3UdS4OoassBpJsb7vE9xBnaPy00VoT2RK8Z4k9tCNGFzUGZKpgWjN6VzvMuLQo3_KqXK_e5E7tBnAdjSm3lPo1BVClP4mVnFletWOTp52F27EhQfZv-brvUjkpNXfxRibzn9CCG0d3E56BWR2aD4JXD3-MCYHcgSSMdVHLDs--/3et/dox31kOgS8iwqY4prkEmSQ/h2/yvT0tUNU72tVEEtkdXz6oTxINCgvGS7l0nGq4hzWJ10)

* * *

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Bruno Amato
Date: August 26th, 2021
Subject: The news out of Afghanistan
Folks — I have been following the news all day as we learn more about the devastating attacks that occurred today in Kabul. My thoughts are with all the families of U.S. and Afghan personnel who were killed and to all who were wounded in these attacks. As a U.S. Navy veteran, I can only imagine the bravery and extreme difficulty of the ongoing evacuation missions by service members and Afghan allies. I know we are indebted to folks who are putting their lives on the line in order to make sure we can safely evacuate as many people as possible. I will be continuing to monitor the situation as it unfolds. The same cannot be said for Kevin McCarthy. If you think he cares about the safety and service of U.S. personnel and Afghans whose lives are in danger, think again, folks. This guy doesn’t care one bit about service members or our country. He only cares about his political ambitions. He is using the ongoing evacuations — which have already surpassed 70,000 people in the past two weeks alone — and twisting the story to fit his own narrative that will make him more money and raise his profile among the extreme far-right supporters. In a seven minute interview on Fox News, CNN reported that McCarthy made five false claims including a racist, false statement of Afghan prisoners “coming across our borders.” **Now, he’s grandstanding about the sacrifice of our service members, the safety of Afghan evacuees, and politicizing these horrific attacks for his own gain. His record shows he voted against actions that would have helped prevent the severity of the current situation in Afghanistan.** It’s disgusting behavior, folks. My heart goes out to the families of the fallen, the thousands of Afghans who’ve been forced to leave their home, the thousands of veterans who served time in a twenty year war that had no point or solution, and all those who are continuing to make sure our mission to evacuate as many people and exit Afghanistan is complete. Bruno Amato

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiL3LYIDBfoA-ZFdzBMghaUV059r_I51Hfw2M2fBq7v-OnJifczR1n8xJcwd-zT5SrIojpO2oAFIHEuJan7t4U0P8DYGnRLE78YKvYWMpgG2CODUZrnZvVOTzol5MkVkPLyeUtZNUavpGEK5QN02euoIqE8nar7qzVO_BHEdl0p7_VWsJMJpidYqA_8-qWgPeGlGWYFOfsd9hiu-mA05FjuNJcpM8KE1vSTxNHAXuucbQVpGPICDxsJLBbcMrTOILJw/3et/dox31kOgS8iwqY4prkEmSQ/h3/xW5s8H3qXy1FMXBfSeapxkBGAuzHKTsOQR06fAVhN2c) | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhsIMdFKSaGG0MlwSFX0_NrYgGjYE0lrd4dSfdc3BHj5uzIGslRzScgHJAqUkbD3-A2e_dWPS6Tn2_Cn59GCBke5aBgWVgHQG4Xiudc-_hWC4_cQfwHeN-CyRL-PPf1np5wJNBCDX-8_u2oYvG28_kScjOwh6SiABD5z50SNOeq5iuFoO-6TlT5rXhMJeFyBNePPlIKDAxf7FPDtpYbqPsPg-YNGaMxZmvWNodteX-npXpfqVc2DZV1_QvaC-Bk57Sw/3et/dox31kOgS8iwqY4prkEmSQ/h4/hXBBpR3dXSdSR_CXc3MQXVXsU8ExaOJGMr_u2RrWsmU)

He is using the ongoing evacuations — which have already surpassed 70,000 people in the past two weeks alone — and twisting the story to fit his own narrative that will make him more money and raise his profile among the extreme far-right supporters. In a seven minute interview on Fox News, CNN reported that McCarthy made five false claims including a racist, false statement of Afghan prisoners “coming across our borders.” Now, he’s grandstanding about the sacrifice of our service members, the safety of Afghan evacuees, and politicizing these horrific attacks for his own gain. His record shows he voted against actions that would have helped prevent the severity of the current situation in Afghanistan.** It’s disgusting behavior, folks. My heart goes out to the families of the fallen, the thousands of Afghans who’ve been forced to leave their home, the thousands of veterans who served time in a twenty year war that had no point or solution, and all those who are continuing to make sure our mission to evacuate as many people and exit Afghanistan is complete. Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Will you be one of my first recruits?

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204855:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r)

---
Peter,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204855:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204855:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204855:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r) **

I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204855:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204855:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58204856:JPw_LN2NQ:m:1:3253819041:1BA86ADACAF7EBA2DAEA10EE5F161A39:r)

subject: HUPFER: Don't Be Fooled: H.R. 4 Is Just Another Power Grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Chairman Hupfer, who serves as RNC General Counsel and is fighting to defend election integrity across the country, penned the following op-ed..

http://www.indgop.org?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID

Chairman Hupfer, who serves as RNC General Counsel and is fighting to defend election integrity across the country, penned the following op-ed for Real Clear Politics calling out continued Demcorat efforts to subvert our elections. HR 4 is nothing short of a Demcorat Power grab. The text of the op-ed is below and you can use this link to tweet and share it:

https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2021/08/26/dont_be_fooled_hr_4_is_just_another_power_grab_146308.html?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Don't Be Fooled: H.R. 4 Is Just Another Power Grab
------------------------------------------------------------

COMMENTARY

By Kyle Hupfer
August 26, 2021

In June, Democrats failed (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fpolitics%2Fsenate-vote-s-1-democrats-fissile-material-go-nuclear-on-filibuster&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786880558%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=bVm9eH5sx1I6ZI4JVxojeiF%2FPlsxAsRFUTg6NLbODy4%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) to sell the federal takeover of state elections known as H.R. 1/S. 1 (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fopinion%2Frnc-chairwoman-mcdaniel-election-integrity-s1&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786890512%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=0pBAQ7NvLM69lhH0hUQZ21SA0cSLSSxzNor7EOZc6%2FM%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) to the
American people. The bill was a laundry list of left-wing fantasies, including using taxpayer dollars to fund political candidates, undermine widely supported voter ID requirements, and totally destroy the authority of states to run their own elections. Americans saw the bill for what it was — a Democrat power grab — and it failed. Now, Democrats are coming back to the table with new legislation called H.R. 4. They’re dishonestly calling it a compromise. Don’t fall for their partisan lies: H.R. 4 has the same rotten core as H.R. 1 and would make our elections far less secure.

H.R. 4’s goal is to eviscerate the right of states to manage their own elections with appropriate transparency and ballot-security safeguards. It will attempt to misuse the 1965 Voting Rights Act (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fopinion%2Fhr4-democrat-election-power-grab-ariz-ag-mark-brnovich&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786890512%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=fboI3iytfF%2FTFzq9Lz5VAXKsiB3p3Dyf6nRefhOqG0w%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) to achieve this goal. “Preclearance” is central to H.R. 4 — this plank of the law would require every state election official to submit any election law changes to the Department of Justice for approval. In short, Democrats want states to ask Washington, D.C., for permission to pass local laws that would, for example, require voter ID — a policy that
polls consistently find (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fpolitics%2Fwidespread-support-for-voter-id-and-making-early-voting-easier-national-poll&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786890512%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=tCWgLxHgUcGMqtIe3iOyuZS%2BUR1bcyNxgoskaBDc%2FXE%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) roughly 80% (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fnypost.com%2F2021%2F07%2F08%2Fnew-poll-shows-78-percent-are-in-favor-of-stronger-voter-id-laws%2F&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786900467%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=A1KhtssVfFJkr5NHvC8%2F99bXRtlRiZo9wz8QfRnYD70%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) of Americans in support. Joe
Biden and Democrats want their politicized Department of Justice to control how states manage their own elections. This is the same Department of Justice that recently sued the State of Georgia over its new election integrity laws. The RNC intervened (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cnbc.com%2F2021%2F07%2F08%2Fgop-groups-rnc-nrsc-fight-biden-dojs-lawsuit-against-georgia-voting-rules.html&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786900467%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=LiYO2uGmDmQL1ZSMIQ2w0fMx8TJAOMijPASd7rwqyJ0%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) to protect Georgia in that lawsuit, and we expect another win there for Republicans on the heels of our recent victory in Brnovich v. DNC
(https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cnbc.com%2F2021%2F07%2F01%2Fsupreme-court-upholds-arizona-voting-rules-democrats-called-discriminatory.html&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786910432%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=vmW%2FP%2B6WYoyUcJvjZflXyvZPK9KZONtf%2F807gI1c45M%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) , which banned ballot trafficking in Arizona. This Department of Justice is currently trying to strong-arm states into making their elections less secure and transparent, and Joe Biden wants to expand its mandate to control every aspect of state-level elections.

That is big-government totalitarianism at its very worst. It bears mentioning that the Supreme Court found old preclearance formulas to be unconstitutional in the 2013 Shelby County v. Holder (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.oyez.org%2Fcases%2F2012%2F12-96&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786910432%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=T5Y6OUmubnl3RjkGUqN9TjbIppm3lKpJHOAZNbHBdcE%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) case. Preclearance’s subjugation of state law to Washington overreach undermines the rights of states to develop and apply best voting practices informed by local knowledge. Democrats are trying to revive an outdated, unconstitutional provision from the 1960s in their stop-at-nothing efforts to undermine election integrity.

H.R. 4 contains other provisions that should concern every American who wants elections to be free, fair, and transparent. The bill takes aim at efforts to clean up voter rolls, attempting to handcuff local officials who attempt to keep their voter lists up-to-date and accurate. For example, the bill would prohibit states from participating in an inter-state accountability process to ensure accurate lists. The bill would also force federal courts to take inaccurate census data and subject every existing strict voter ID requirement to Department of Justice review.

This is not what the American people want. Polling shows that Americans — including a majority (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fsites%2Falisondurkee%2F2021%2F06%2F21%2F80-of-americans-support-voter-id-rules-but-fewer-worried-about-fraud-poll-finds%2F&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786920387%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=42aU094Q7K65TpTGJCwUp5Optr%2FiuSoNZ2kAbrSpuvE%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) of Democrats and minority voters — support voter ID. Polling also shows that 68%
(https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpunchbowl.news%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2FON-National-S1-Rearch-Memo-FINAL.pdf&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786920387%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=ey0NHERbeoeBLrwI22fCpLERhbO8UsgUjMeM96u8nqo%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) of voters believe that state legislatures should decide the voting rules and regulations for their state, not the federal government. That number alone should invalidate Democrat attempts to strip all local authority from state-level election officials.

Democrats are upset that states like Georgia, Florida, Arizona, and Iowa have taken the initiative and passed strong election integrity laws. They can’t bear the thought that states might act without input from D.C. bureaucrats. That concept is antithetical to their power-grab mentality, and so they want to suppress state-run elections.

Democrats failed to pass H.R. 1, and H.R. 4 will meet a similar fate. H.R. 4 is totally out of line with public opinion and an extreme power grab that Americans will reject. As Democrat lies and schemes continue to fail, Republicans will continue to ensure (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fprotectthevote.com%2F&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C2ac9f24a062b412acbfa08d967f89e95%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637655139786930336%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=%2FBgHi8wxZ8HQNVwLEzF45tkCuXnPbr3Byn3EYuQSZ0Q%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID) the security and transparency of our elections.

============================================================
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/indgop?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/indgop?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Website (www.indgop.org)
** Google Plus (https://plus.google.com/u/0/+indgop/posts?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Instagram (http://instagram.com/indgop?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** YouTube (http://www.youtube.com/indgop?mc_cid=6d2070effc&mc_eid=UNIQID)

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: ❗️RARE OFFER❗️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE

name: Josh Mandel
subject: BREAKING: Election Integrity Rally August 31
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
Next Tuesday, August 31st I am hosting an Election Integrity Rally to focus on stopping the Democrat election cheating.

President Trump’s election attorney Jenna Ellis will be speaking at it, as well as the leader of the Arizona election audit, Senator Wendy Rogers.

This is one that you won’t want to miss!

We are holding it at Grace Brethren Church in the Dayton area and people from all corners of Ohio are driving in for it. Feel free to invite your friends and family. [**CLICK HERE TO RSVP NOW**](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=eb4e38fe49e9420d8c08e8b1f1aaa1d2&_e=NqCEgNel6_TSgeQ9-PbnWDH9TPBhHRh3zvdWootxCnd9OseIw3nr_rafMCXhP40d9cXNtUhl9zBIHYctQEdFopjeLuAbA_bRph6ncjDxyKDRGzEhjLlOJnJpVvklQNCro6tZn8yAPWt61kLX0e4FPqwiFXlqG2JHUelJUSZcTObiK4X4a1Y8z9WA_u25COhCUXvWEM5DOeUdn_ChwXLIRYBYiqtgkyEGpTx_6nqm3ty8UUFLtSqN-5x7yUu3fDqX5a6HSJm43Jo0l41F_M5oby3Su7Jl0q-R9TSl9H-o6aC1fb6ZbZTdxGHp1LemGrOqiEleS-OByKm9LC2x5XzwxJwDxX1ITZkD6yK9U2ZvQZsI5NhZhuz-7qq0xvO0-kLgjsxX4GqQz02Z3I1hbq0gYA%3D%3D) Election integrity is the most critical issue that Conservatives face right now. We need to abolish the January 6th Commission and replace it with a November 3rd Commission to investigate the Democrat cheating from the 2020 election and ensure that it **NEVER** happens again.

I want you to join us for this important discussion on our elections and ensuring they are **FREE & FAIR** heading into 2022. The rally is completely free and you can RSVP here: [https://jmwendy.eventbrite.com/?aff=email](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=eb4e38fe49e9420d8c08e8b1f1aaa1d2&_e=NqCEgNel6_TSgeQ9-PbnWBHlILuE5BFvB8cnqjFKbPvnSr4tZLXv19cAXUSP7wq0eiD9JqKpfiCCAJtH9chBpxvL-htX2EWvHfGP3IPuOvC19q9z_3Z8UQIes43Rm-YkbNhskjVk0GfAahBec0TkDe3W_2GYd_VhcpYQmdvHFHn86neOzclCscKPgaNk262FQwYrJ1UwSawLQ76BIFem-0Hbz86OQJ06tb5qq99dc9wvbzg2H7Q0IG5uVehJKbdCsCoQvxkV3PgBYW-fBiFJtDkavTJHPYoFMJfmGxfa_Tk%3D)

See you on Tuesday,
Josh **Senator Wendy Rogers** is leading the charge in Arizona on the audit of their elections. She is now traveling the country and leading the charge on Election Integrity. Senator Rogers is visiting the Miami Valley on August 31 to give an update on what she is hearing and doing to bring integrity to our elections! Senator Rogers is an Air Force Vet who was previously stationed at Wright Patterson Air Force Base. Learn more about Senator Wendy Rogers: [wendyrogers.org](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=eb4e38fe49e9420d8c08e8b1f1aaa1d2&_e=NqCEgNel6_TSgeQ9-PbnWEqB-da0JY6l54iuYs_Z4lbpjtWmKbEQ05EFdzHdO_8tIXf4DbnHWKWp7Zw0iry5TKh30Zqm6RK8K-TzUUpRIpB6jyXes0BeVD5DS8wJSEbD4hAZKEeELG2rWn61Yp5GCS7jaTn4g0o_ieE6oNTyTlmu-FCEoCWptKMIFEIZYXpj2NlGCuhe400eE_6D5PumL_QMQgNYQJCNagrhWpNhnQz9gOQRWK6i_1irD2AU0mP8H8V18XyrOcCOGum6m_2CVw%3D%3D) **Jenna Ellis **is a constitutional law attorney and the former Senior Legal Advisor and Counsel to President Donald J. Trump. She's the author of _The Legal Basis for a Moral Constitution_ , a book arguing that the Constitution of the United States can only be interpreted in accordance with the Bible. Jenna is currently a Newsmax contributor. [**CLICK HERE TO RSVP NOW**](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=eb4e38fe49e9420d8c08e8b1f1aaa1d2&_e=NqCEgNel6_TSgeQ9-PbnWDH9TPBhHRh3zvdWootxCnd9OseIw3nr_rafMCXhP40d9cXNtUhl9zBIHYctQEdFopjeLuAbA_bRph6ncjDxyKDRGzEhjLlOJnJpVvklQNCro6tZn8yAPWt61kLX0e4FPqwiFXlqG2JHUelJUSZcTObiK4X4a1Y8z9WA_u25COhCsNvNk2DNE_O8Yi0B7GYhtzXRLSm1o1uKa98Emf1ndDqm4vpVX4LDvicbrjZO2vkTBk7ztMYTFzHR_bqDrnHoZneWxER1KV5v1gPK9_4wg0vEOuxn7MMLo4rocMG-btGPFltcb7Swk2ZvnKBmHd9i1prRFa0ypRyPvAz-0OZtkzNSArGqHqIfVI9PiT5-3Lf3piLGmSJPoPUdeCPMT8b8Rg%3D%3D) [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=eb4e38fe49e9420d8c08e8b1f1aaa1d2&_e=NqCEgNel6_TSgeQ9-PbnWDH9TPBhHRh3zvdWootxCnd9OseIw3nr_rafMCXhP40d9cXNtUhl9zBIHYctQEdFopjeLuAbA_bRph6ncjDxyKDRGzEhjLlOJnJpVvklQNCro6tZn8yAPWt61kLX0e4FPqwiFXlqG2JHUelJUSZcTObiK4X4a1Y8z9WA_u25COhC2rXhamOZ17XsZav3DQ99cl4wxhl0ryCOV76hx1jgDPE5gQxD00Kt6QHhSKOYWJgctlcC3t0y6vbBw4r3OuT2jNal2bBZXbVrD5v8GkWqmvrIU0F3Q5s3LnanYS8Z7pYjMOCFXHCqByY6gEdVP-9TXiVcgbghAoPSPJ4wB-5HMFf3H9T22BKt5U52Pki1Cl4cGmFlYadA6Us6Yu3i9JxyxA%3D%3D) [ | | |

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Opinion poll: do you approve of Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
VOTE NOW -- Is President Donald Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=bfde231f179743409da9cf847b16e2b7&_t=NlAMLyvD9Irw-tZj77Mr0oSa8AB4KNfl7RhhdP3yByQRIxKmF2TKf3Ph2tdWu9uuUfjHOXAyy34sOsQQLxpYylilxtJ-N3UoS_jPTj21t9zrnNJjfOBBXIDceOoFs-8J8ebUQTCnmyh-mYHhaufO4yQo7-2brAoZIesHTEbHszg%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfde231f179743409da9cf847b16e2b7&_e=oMlsIcE294yH2iF8t58RUOISUxzZPlilS7YYcaDBFdAk5p_wNkgb9_LhMc_ThWUu2mfwQNzlhOYbjA_N0sTj81cWqJEXTrvYZyKdP285zT3mKqyv1JDK2RPFWak-YNmX8Oe4cOxR85jpUuQH9Q-y55Zdn90-ElficLsdQ43pJbMwmk0bxs7xQVtjVsBe2YTBkyVdGjhi-HLJZCGMbLgKChfODRhsiAfk6ydxYHzgNYpSTpedbDI7B9DfORwemjm1V2nWg1aVY8FXTEbzoBiSWOMz8LroZjokkxhHUexrnRgDm9vd17FfLnBxBj4g3NOz9jx2HlHqXQXzJi1uTI8BG6ERAU_OvE11l3GHcdk1yXfRb7T1bxgttqgNpxGtlSLQjkr7uBAeIgBwWFh9XG82Nt04b2TQ-a9Yx7pOso1fSAgdvxkRGJagjDcxECUZtuid6hhY11KVYup-HD1TCy3EL3b1_7BvmjlYlBCmOJD0Wi_nwFbh_l4Iwl2bmIGZa2RJJWXo8jWMovZo3QSBF1WQaQ%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

Recently, my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly,**[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfde231f179743409da9cf847b16e2b7&_e=oMlsIcE294yH2iF8t58RUOISUxzZPlilS7YYcaDBFdAk5p_wNkgb9_LhMc_ThWUu2mfwQNzlhOYbjA_N0sTj81cWqJEXTrvYZyKdP285zT3mKqyv1JDK2RPFWak-YNmX8Oe4cOxR85jpUuQH9Q-y55Zdn90-ElficLsdQ43pJbMwmk0bxs7xQVtjVsBe2YTBkyVdGjhi-HLJZCGMbLgKChfODRhsiAfk6ydxYHzgNYpSTpedbDI7B9DfORwemjm1V2nWg1aVY8FXTEbzoBiSWOMz8LroZjokkxhHUexrnRgDm9vd17FfLnBxBj4g3NOzw-e1PImf2n3TyNJndyzL-2kHQdciAgViRrcn6MvgIVuC8H7XhnRwMXIOqWmoPSDWc3xxPCdKcZLrMht8iBp9j9WWMNs2zQpbnVjMFzwZ4qcjK4AirlvZNu4XCCa_EeUqAismAW2Ij_8NCkryXiJOs96XmC5yEXkhVDTKXaGA714h1gTV8Sh8Jcp1Z4WJaU4Gug5Dz62OoMpe0cG5xfUXHQ%3D%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 10,000 votes short. **

Fellow American, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfde231f179743409da9cf847b16e2b7&_e=oMlsIcE294yH2iF8t58RUOISUxzZPlilS7YYcaDBFdAk5p_wNkgb9_LhMc_ThWUu2mfwQNzlhOYbjA_N0sTj81cWqJEXTrvYZyKdP285zT3mKqyv1JDK2RPFWak-YNmX8Oe4cOxR85jpUuQH9Q-y55Zdn90-ElficLsdQ43pJbMwmk0bxs7xQVtjVsBe2YTBkyVdGjhi-HLJZCGMbLgKChfODRhsiAfk6ydxYHzgNYpSTpedbDI7B9DfORwemjm1V2nWg1aVY8FXTEbzoBiSWOMz8LroZjokkxhHUexrnRgDm9vd17FfLnBxBj4g3NOz4RSGCV3IfZjIRv-SEwW_B57nX-a506evibTWE3RGE5ZeYpXMjFjuITWzh8KfuUUP6HwlQ_hRH5bMgOMm7a9ktEp0XIuMQ1KL53A9Jjpw15mcSfddQ0jyBoF80rUuBzW3ZX2EFkSFy7iPBu-Bk448pmvJCb6RE-yErlE8rRod374pYhL_nn5KibkHdYyGf9KPex-rPFFVq0Xc9sfpmW3F4A%3D%3D)**

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfde231f179743409da9cf847b16e2b7&_e=oMlsIcE294yH2iF8t58RUOISUxzZPlilS7YYcaDBFdAk5p_wNkgb9_LhMc_ThWUu2mfwQNzlhOYbjA_N0sTj81cWqJEXTrvYZyKdP285zT3mKqyv1JDK2RPFWak-YNmX8Oe4cOxR85jpUuQH9Q-y55Zdn90-ElficLsdQ43pJbMwmk0bxs7xQVtjVsBe2YTBkyVdGjhi-HLJZCGMbLgKChfODRhsiAfk6ydxYHzgNYpSTpedbDI7B9DfORwemjm1V2nWg1aVY8FXTEbzoBiSWOMz8LroZjokkxhHUexrnRgDm9vd17FfLnBxBj4g3NOzQmfX7uBJHIyR4mitjZfaxewevvDfW1r5330accEH4BLEkLHl9XnRyB3HwCN6YB0YdjXE56FrO9x5gusyergMVsW7vbipnueSQlVBgsIxg68FIQ-VCzHo61ldWsLVdcdVSh9696o1Yu38pZDhRD0qOIqWFRjFiSntRSLIucCHS5bQepCUvg0d4KiQMOF2IZiGjuEXl47qH_TE8-8Ov7IIEA%3D%3D)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfde231f179743409da9cf847b16e2b7&_e=oMlsIcE294yH2iF8t58RUOISUxzZPlilS7YYcaDBFdAk5p_wNkgb9_LhMc_ThWUu2mfwQNzlhOYbjA_N0sTj81cWqJEXTrvYZyKdP285zT3mKqyv1JDK2RPFWak-YNmX8Oe4cOxR85jpUuQH9Q-y55Zdn90-ElficLsdQ43pJbMwmk0bxs7xQVtjVsBe2YTBkyVdGjhi-HLJZCGMbLgKChfODRhsiAfk6ydxYHzgNYpSTpedbDI7B9DfORwemjm1V2nWg1aVY8FXTEbzoBiSWOMz8LroZjokkxhHUexrnRgDm9vd17FfLnBxBj4g3NOznE-YLLQ5-oFBxrpl8obGvmVuacVEUnsDbyWhdmK2MHCLV8N06dl_1-PTNOeeeLbneO6n1ovb8ODD_3LEjh8FyjGktXXE98pSZOuK5oxXNqbAu4n-G6h9xNq86_6rrsHKRz2BsZ9J_Cg1a3_jZPZlYpnzRvujO2EZQBQb5KpxnjbHXkaA-WYBsifMzda9HctfiQOpmMXWGou3IZrQhGGGvg%3D%3D)**

We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

subject: Biden needs to resign
body:
The Afghanistan withdrawal is a disaster and embarrassment
---

| Peter,
I said it before and I'll say it again: Biden must resign. If he doesn't, then we must impeach him after winning back the Senate.
How dare Democrats impeach President Trump when Biden is pushing our country off a cliff!

* There's no plan in Afghanistan. Americans are dying. Our leaders stand by and ask the Taliban to protect Americans.
* COVID lockdowns and mandates are destroying our economy.
* Inflation is here. Biden wants to spend another $3.5 TRILLION. He's spent $9 TRILLION since 2020.

We need Biden OUT.
I am a businessman like Trump. I won't play petty political games with American lives or our economy. I will go to Congress and, like Trump, execute a plan to get these incompetent leaders out of our military and government.
Also like Trump, I don't court the special interests or the woke corporations. I don't have the press on my side.
I rely 100% on hardcore, freedom-loving Americans who want to get our country back on track.
Please, Peter, send an urgent donation today to help us win this critical election.

clean_body: The Afghanistan withdrawal is a disaster and embarrassment | | | | | | == | Peter, I said it before and I'll say it again: Biden must resign. If he doesn't, then we must impeach him after winning back the Senate. How dare Democrats impeach President Trump when Biden is pushing our country off a cliff! There's no plan in Afghanistan. Americans are dying. Our leaders stand by and ask the Taliban to protect Americans. COVID lockdowns and mandates are destroying our economy. * Inflation is here. Biden wants to spend another $3.5 TRILLION. He's spent $9 TRILLION since 2020. We need Biden OUT. I am a businessman like Trump. I won't play petty political games with American lives or our economy. I will go to Congress and, like Trump, execute a plan to get these incompetent leaders out of our military and government. Also like Trump, I don't court the special interests or the woke corporations. I don't have the press on my side. I rely 100% on hardcore, freedom-loving Americans who want to get our country back on track. Please, Peter, send an urgent donation today to help us win this critical election. == == == == == == == == In Liberty, | | Mike Gibbons Candidate for US Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

An extremist anti-choice group just launched an attack ad campaign against me.

name: Team AOC
subject: [LIST] What’s in the reconciliation package
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria is leading the fight for the boldest investment in working families since the New Deal era. Let’s have her back.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210827-2377-header&t=1&akid=2377%2E2526796%2E6UR3jJ)
By a vote of 220-212, Congress took a monumental step this week toward passing our $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. By some measures, this bill would be the most consequential step forward for working families since the New Deal era.
**Not enough people are talking about how big this could be!**
The resolution would invest in a number of key priorities:
✅ Fund universal pre-K for children ages 3-4
✅ Expand Medicare to cover hearing, dental and vision
✅ Offer two years of free community college
✅ Cement $300 monthly child tax credit checks for families
✅ Address climate change head on by reducing emissions
✅ Support working parents with childcare funding
✅ Lower prescription drug costs
✅ Establish a pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants
✅ Address climate change head on by reducing emissions
✅ Raise taxes on the wealthy and large corporations
---
Look, the truth is that **without the leadership of Alexandria and her progressive colleagues, this bill would have died** in the House this week.
At the last possible moment before a key vote, a handful of conservative Democrats threatened to block the bill altogether. They wanted to pass a much weaker Republican-backed bill that invests in physical infrastructure only so that they could chip away or vote ‘no’ altogether on this budget bill.
Alexandria and the progressive caucus showed solidarity, refusing to cave and reaffirming they’ll only vote for the infrastructure bill if the House passes this package that delivers on overdue promises for working families. It made all the difference, and in the end, the resolution to move forward passed by just a few votes.
**But the fight isn’t over. So we’re asking for your support.** [Can you make a $3 donation to Alexandria today? Your donations power our campaign to defend her seat and allow her to keep showing the leadership we need in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210827?refcode=em20210827-2377-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2377_2526796_6UR3jJ&akid=2377%2E2526796%2E6UR3jJ)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210827?refcode=em20210827-2377-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2377_2526796_6UR3jJ&akid=2377%2E2526796%2E6UR3jJ)**
We’re on the brink of passing this extremely historic investment in American families, but there’s still a lot of fight left to be had. Conservative Democrats in the Senate are already talking about shrinking the bill.
With the public on our side, and a grassroots movement behind Alexandria and other congressional progressives, we can win.
**Without your support, Alexandria couldn’t be in D.C. fighting for us in the first place.** [So, if you can today, please make a $3 donation to our campaign so we can defend her seat and keep leading the fight to pass this historic plan.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210827?refcode=em20210827-2377-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2377_2526796_6UR3jJ&akid=2377%2E2526796%2E6UR3jJ)
Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement.
\- Team AOC

clean_body: Alexandria is leading the fight for the boldest investment in working families since the New Deal era. Let’s have her back. By a vote of 220-212, Congress took a monumental step this week toward passing our $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. By some measures, this bill would be the most consequential step forward for working families since the New Deal era. Not enough people are talking about how big this could be! The resolution would invest in a number of key priorities: ✅ Fund universal pre-K for children ages 3-4 ✅ Expand Medicare to cover hearing, dental and vision ✅ Offer two years of free community college ✅ Cement $300 monthly child tax credit checks for families ✅ Address climate change head on by reducing emissions ✅ Support working parents with childcare funding ✅ Lower prescription drug costs ✅ Establish a pathway to citizenship for undocumented immigrants ✅ Address climate change head on by reducing emissions ✅ Raise taxes on the wealthy and large corporations Look, the truth is that without the leadership of Alexandria and her progressive colleagues, this bill would have died in the House this week. At the last possible moment before a key vote, a handful of conservative Democrats threatened to block the bill altogether. They wanted to pass a much weaker Republican-backed bill that invests in physical infrastructure only so that they could chip away or vote ‘no’ altogether on this budget bill. Alexandria and the progressive caucus showed solidarity, refusing to cave and reaffirming they’ll only vote for the infrastructure bill if the House passes this package that delivers on overdue promises for working families. It made all the difference, and in the end, the resolution to move forward passed by just a few votes. But the fight isn’t over. So we’re asking for your support. We’re on the brink of passing this extremely historic investment in American families, but there’s still a lot of fight left to be had. Conservative Democrats in the Senate are already talking about shrinking the bill. With the public on our side, and a grassroots movement behind Alexandria and other congressional progressives, we can win. Without your support, Alexandria couldn’t be in D.C. fighting for us in the first place. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement. \- Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Crisis on the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205149:JR1L1N2Nq:m:1:3253819041:6E59C81AE0D711C6112EAC1C15DF85F0:r) Peter, The Biden border crisis is worse than it has _**EVER**_ been. In June, 180,000 illegal immigrants crossed the U.S.-Mexico border. In July, U.S. Border Patrol reported nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossing into America -- the **HIGHEST** number in more than two decades. **And today America functionally has OPEN BORDERS thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we 're on pace for 2 MILLION PEOPLE to cross illegally into our country.** [**Joe Biden and radical Democrats refuse to enforce the law -- and America is paying the price. We _must_ do everything in our power to ensure that we take control of the Senate next fall and send good Republicans to Washington to fight alongside me. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205149:JR1L1N2Nq:m:1:3253819041:6E59C81AE0D711C6112EAC1C15DF85F0:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205149:JR1L1N2Nq:m:1:3253819041:6E59C81AE0D711C6112EAC1C15DF85F0:r) **_Last year, thanks to President Trump and a responsible Republican Senate, we had the lowest rate of illegal immigration in 45 years._** But Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and radical Democrats in Congress have destroyed America's border and homeland security in just MONTHS. It's gotten so severe, the United States Supreme Court had to intervene by reversing Biden's decision to end the Trump-era "Remain in Mexico" policy. This international agreement, negotiated between President Trump with the government of Mexico, requires illegal immigrants who crossed the border to stay in Mexico while their asylum cases are adjudicated in the United States. [**We must end this Biden border crisis, which is why I 'm counting on your help to WIN the Republican majority in 2022 ... to RESTORE our border security ... and to END the Democrats' dangerous immigration policies. Will you make your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205149:JR1L1N2Nq:m:1:3253819041:6E59C81AE0D711C6112EAC1C15DF85F0:r) As soon as they took power in D.C., Democrats immediately stopped construction on President Trump's border wall. They reinstated the failed policy of "catch and release" which sends illegal immigrants, many of whom are sick with COVID, into our communities. And they ended the incredibly successful "Remain in Mexico" international agreement, which meant people who entered Mexico illegally then crossed into the U.S. would stay in Mexico -- **NOT America** -- while their cases were pending. **_Unlike Joe Biden, I have been to the U.S.-Mexico border this year because I care about keeping America safe and keeping our border secure ... and I've seen the CRISIS that Democrats' damaging and cruel policies have created._** **_Peter_**[**, please help me TODAY with your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more as I fight to SECURE OUR BORDER and win back the Republican majority in the critical election next year.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205149:JR1L1N2Nq:m:1:3253819041:6E59C81AE0D711C6112EAC1C15DF85F0:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205149:JR1L1N2Nq:m:1:3253819041:6E59C81AE0D711C6112EAC1C15DF85F0:r) For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

body:
I'm showing Americans that healing and unity does not come by giving more power to our current politicians that have used us for a paycheck, it will b I'm showing Americans that healing and unity does not come by giving more power to our current politicians that have used us for a paycheck, it will be achieved by electing real, honest American patriots ready to change our country. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02f4acd32f854196b602b841b96841b6&_e=_To54dXWVrgdCN22lI8sgZIpVA8OMiQ_aK1xqUx9_S8lvA1tzyowipQpupiRl8n6BxH_MyGo957aaj0U4WY17_HUvi7RKHEY1UXoInqOe7ytMP6GZ_EBf5a9SKwafKpkArScuQL_KNDTPJ6COunfM5fkKv8VRHVioPKK1XqVA4ml-_NOG78qjQnB-VdFd_GBCKHHnb4JVBSgQxcglkaQsSI8ev36rzZfc4yX_3phMHI66Ng1CzwlV0g6wm7NLwLMm5ZH8e-ZmOezrhctlMl2JtyEj0ADWiDfY_j8Ii_WHrIyvGChdkGJnjWpOxrNTSWsOk4EhkpbKYL2MvsAhWDKeBQiSoHIMT_lh41UTZUkKN6V119nm93E7dkIuegaVGYjv6CtPJ8Dm_VmyppVq9NRHNUC2Wsgz_Xa8T2cY8NyBHivKXIuCkq95eF62DvcJYTwv9Na4isyCrJDqm6cJlwP7Q%3D%3D)
Fellow Conservative,

I'm what Obama should have been in 2008, **and it's not because I'm black and running for office.**

[**I'm a conservative pastor running for Congress and unlike Obama, I'm here to lift the minority community UP and unite ALL Americans.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02f4acd32f854196b602b841b96841b6&_e=_To54dXWVrgdCN22lI8sgZIpVA8OMiQ_aK1xqUx9_S8lvA1tzyowipQpupiRl8n6BxH_MyGo957aaj0U4WY17_HUvi7RKHEY1UXoInqOe7ytMP6GZ_EBf5a9SKwafKpkArScuQL_KNDTPJ6COunfM5fkKv8VRHVioPKK1XqVA4ml-_NOG78qjQnB-VdFd_GBCKHHnb4JVBSgQxcglkaQsSI8ev36rzZfc4yX_3phMHI66Ng1CzwlV0g6wm7NLwLMmViM31gKvMxpK7_UANvqGSrwdBBCGxjAhAbhr9sMBeeWBnUaBuSb3XCn5SFGBkIIdaWO5jQRM3dS6ul2RgT6fbKoZhXAjJdAUfSqCSQI--FAn_q7HumgYZJJftdwDbqR6QGfpH_bo78WqR7O1TNN50X_rtFeu8XfzFmDIG0GTGTsMDGbIrPWaRhVTL3LgAZZzvL_D04tUniDIsGItlDD_A%3D%3D)

[**SUPPORT PASTOR BRIAN -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02f4acd32f854196b602b841b96841b6&_e=_To54dXWVrgdCN22lI8sgZIpVA8OMiQ_aK1xqUx9_S8lvA1tzyowipQpupiRl8n6BxH_MyGo957aaj0U4WY17_HUvi7RKHEY1UXoInqOe7ytMP6GZ_EBf5a9SKwafKpkArScuQL_KNDTPJ6COunfM5fkKv8VRHVioPKK1XqVA4ml-_NOG78qjQnB-VdFd_GBCKHHnb4JVBSgQxcglkaQsSI8ev36rzZfc4yX_3phMHI66Ng1CzwlV0g6wm7NLwLMpTzpDNfua43SIWRWJzx_IohNBGli_MYDgauGHHqSC3HhWwyChopakHA60RTrAZoKmSiUQR_RgxNaUpoIBR3WYCt_EYJUofD_CRPV_oeO08Y1Qib6QpbCCWoUYATopNVbL1oxJiu1B4dfvuwyuZCn02kYIxG0DZNmsqIOuvatjzblWYIRfxHGykJAnbSYoz9X1wXKQ744o3HKIVvLbFVCBA%3D%3D)
You would think having a black president would have made substantial moves towards a more unified America - bridging the divide between all ethnicities. But powerful Democrats like Obama peddled political infighting, deep division and victim mentality -_**and they're still doing it**_.

I have already weathered vicious attacks for being a Black conservative. I've been called countless names, including... _Coon. Uncle Tom._ And more that are so horrible, I don't feel comfortable writing them in this email.

I know how to overcome obstacles as a Black man in America. I grew up the hard way and that's what makes me real - unlike many politicians in Washington.

I grew up in a poor family that survived on government assistance. I spent a total of 10 years in prison for crimes when I was younger, including charged involving illegal gun possession and wrecking and then failing to return a rental car. **Now, I am a proud father of four, devoted pastor, city council member, and distinguished member of my community.**

I am an open book, %%FIRST%% - that's why I'm not afraid to tell you of my past. **The truth is, being a Black man, it would have been EASY to blame racism for my run-ins with the law. It would have been EASY to adopt the victim mentality Democrats like Obama tell black Americans they are entitled to.**

**But I want to dismantle that kind of thinking.** **I want to break the narrative that minority Americans will always be victims, because that right there is the chains politicians use to hold black men like me down.**

[**If you are exhausted by the political divide in America and the mind-games politicians use to control us, then please, join my team today to help me create real change across our nation.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02f4acd32f854196b602b841b96841b6&_e=_To54dXWVrgdCN22lI8sgZIpVA8OMiQ_aK1xqUx9_S8lvA1tzyowipQpupiRl8n6BxH_MyGo957aaj0U4WY17_HUvi7RKHEY1UXoInqOe7ytMP6GZ_EBf5a9SKwafKpkArScuQL_KNDTPJ6COunfM5fkKv8VRHVioPKK1XqVA4ml-_NOG78qjQnB-VdFd_GBCKHHnb4JVBSgQxcglkaQsSI8ev36rzZfc4yX_3phMHI66Ng1CzwlV0g6wm7NLwLMUrb9TQf4oDh2VoyOpn0iITQsSCtFlsB3sjtCEAhKDQsu0znImz7c0mzv0xhcPHabQqrMbqJl4y8x4axtBkwEvAwpBs1bbZydUv5Y0jfEoUdeaHiehq1TK1TPTgXvOeMxGqvVvhLNLIgOx9A5h1sMZ4nB3HCZDjcp7ZHNqbDuZlcEWsi2dygc26LCt5Fhyl1tZ7qk3AMjZdsXik-6ufXCvg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I'm showing Americans that healing and unity does not come by giving more power to our current politicians that have used us for a paycheck, it will b I'm showing Americans that healing and unity does not come by giving more power to our current politicians that have used us for a paycheck, it will be achieved by electing real, honest American patriots ready to change our country. | Fellow Conservative, I'm what Obama should have been in 2008, and it's not because I'm black and running for office. You would think having a black president would have made substantial moves towards a more unified America - bridging the divide between all ethnicities. But powerful Democrats like Obama peddled political infighting, deep division and victim mentality -and they're still doing it. I have already weathered vicious attacks for being a Black conservative. I've been called countless names, including... Coon. Uncle Tom. And more that are so horrible, I don't feel comfortable writing them in this email. I know how to overcome obstacles as a Black man in America. I grew up the hard way and that's what makes me real - unlike many politicians in Washington. I grew up in a poor family that survived on government assistance. I spent a total of 10 years in prison for crimes when I was younger, including charged involving illegal gun possession and wrecking and then failing to return a rental car. Now, I am a proud father of four, devoted pastor, city council member, and distinguished member of my community. I am an open book, %%FIRST%% - that's why I'm not afraid to tell you of my past. The truth is, being a Black man, it would have been EASY to blame racism for my run-ins with the law. It would have been EASY to adopt the victim mentality Democrats like Obama tell black Americans they are entitled to. But I want to dismantle that kind of thinking. I want to break the narrative that minority Americans will always be victims, because that right there is the chains politicians use to hold black men like me down. Right now, America needs unity, especially to overcome the crisis we are facing as a nation. Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: SB 1 just passed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
The Texas House just passed voter suppression bill SB 1, which, combined
with the poll closures, voter ID laws and racial gerrymandering of our
state over the last eight years, comprises the greatest attack on voting
rights in modern Texas history. At this point, the bill is all but certain
to head to Governor Abbott’s desk soon, where he will sign it into law.

There’s a way forward from here, but first, it’s important that we thank
everyone who has fought the good fight so far. Everyone who has marched,
rallied, called their state legislators, and spent hours upon hours at the
state capitol trying to stop this bill — you are my heroes. After today’s
vote, many of you may be doubting whether all of that effort made a
difference, but I want to make clear that it did.

That courageous work on the part of everyday Texans forced Republican
lawmakers to walk back some of its worst provisions, brought national
attention to the fight for democracy in Texas, and gave our Democratic
legislators the support they needed to break quorum and fight this fight.
And most importantly, it pushed Congress to make progress on the For the
People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act, which would override the SB 1
voter suppression bill, unrig our elections, and help us build a true
multiracial democracy in America.

This isn’t the time to give up or give in.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/biden-voting-rights?source=em20210827&t=1001&akid=151230%2E444211%2ETNA-J9 ]Now that this bill has passed in Texas, we must direct our resources
toward pushing President Biden to do everything in his power to reform the
filibuster and pass voting rights legislation. Please take a moment to
write or email him and urge him to use the full force of his office to get
this done.

These federal bills could save voting rights in America, but only if all
of us do all we can to get them passed and signed into law.

Much like the 1965 Voting Rights Act depended on millions of Americans to
push President Lyndon Johnson to use the extraordinary power of his office
to get it passed, today’s voting rights bills call upon you and me to do
our part to push President Biden to do the same. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/biden-voting-rights?source=em20210827&t=1002&akid=151230%2E444211%2ETNA-J9 ]So please, contact
President Biden and urge him to give this fight everything he’s got.

I know we can do it.

Keep the faith,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20210827-151230&t=1003&akid=151230%2E444211%2ETNA-J9 ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=151230%2E444211%2ETNA-J9

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

body:
It's time to step up and fight back

Peter,

_**The border is in crisis.

Inflation is out of control.

And now Afghanistan is in complete chaos.**_

**It 's only been 7 months but it's clear, Biden's presidency has been a complete disaster!**

That is why this is our most important End of Month Deadline of 2021. It is only a few days away, and we must hit our goal, so we can FIRE Nancy Pelosi and STOP Biden's failing America LAST agenda.

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Porter congratulates Biden on Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by this ignorance and disrespect. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d1a5e776cc34de7aa7200eadd6f34c9&_e=DO0Niq8etEY2k7fLaNeA2py9QVTb7NpDj_qiEZTDKUGsqLO5DYQ6lHXHFzvnMBSdzyZJkVpv0MPsh45GOMFY267pf0CowctFCOegeA9RZnLSESRtffu1Glod1z4ljI27y7Lm0DJ7sx7krMeH-DOaRsRd_Bn0YdmCMwKJTxoP3MMX3wlsWR3mezcPT0cMZznKzYGHLIzmlTS8GWWZmfFYExw8Aeo8kaS9Ks8Pcv--Nkz_f8-mLkuJ77UFAbMkQGUL97JJHXD6gkRIUiWvX9xvUa231f9NLTr4XRWAMmZFzb87yIoT6Awd6FgGFDZetKpKLkPe3w7AtLyQ2rsyNscfhEP_Bw85SjtmiK9EdZaPtFYHTBfxjI0Wql5QyaH7vPYO_IKnIDyTEI-0ueq2ghh7XMhWUv1KTDfsajc9Jw454N3EEgw2cUCmk5w3qc1Pi77XbWxMMmOz6-jjatGhjj4iwrjr-BkJshCM5aGC5XP5RTtz06-Xd_mdkkJX5JHla5wQ)

---
Peter,

My opponent **Katie Porter** previously joined **Ilhan Omar** and the rest of their radical friends in the House Progressive Caucus in congratulating President Biden for pulling our troops out of Afghanistan, which has left that country in chaos at the hands of the Taliban with both American lives and innocent Afghan in serious jeopardy.

_Does Katie Porter still think this was a good idea?_ Her constituents are left wondering. It has been five days since the Taliban took Kabul and she has said NOTHING.

Porter and Omar claim the war that I fought in personally to protect them and our entire country from terrorism, and in which thousands of American soldiers gave their lives, **was just a distraction...**

**As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect with which this statement was made.**

This is exactly why we need new leadership in Congress and in America – and clearly leftist Katie Porter needs to be among the first to go.

[**Will you help me – a conservative Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan – defeat Katie Porter in CA-45 by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d1a5e776cc34de7aa7200eadd6f34c9&_e=DO0Niq8etEY2k7fLaNeA2py9QVTb7NpDj_qiEZTDKUGsqLO5DYQ6lHXHFzvnMBSdzyZJkVpv0MPsh45GOMFY267pf0CowctFCOegeA9RZnLSESRtffu1Glod1z4ljI27y7Lm0DJ7sx7krMeH-DOaRsRd_Bn0YdmCMwKJTxoP3MMX3wlsWR3mezcPT0cMZznKzYGHLIzmlTS8GWWZmfFYExw8Aeo8kaS9Ks8Pcv--Nkz_f8-mLkuJ77UFAbMkQGUL97JJHXD6gkRIUiWvX9xvUfuY-eh_Ztk9DvU-cKlmgEY6LcaZ8TLMw2Sh22_cwkXhI2oKpMWxzok-m1zLVlQcNZb84vvhMBT4us-JCEvCHM6KzL9TNGlGKeyIZlvZEVzhz-TQtlemSXUMZxqw2PygqLOnSt1c_eA6Zh3VNvozpkN8I7pmoEQpQ5c11l620d_Ran-KpPhYxI886lIgL0_oabto5cfkV5X1yBFve9T0AVMQo4mOkvBFGO3zw_KgbWsy)

[** SUPPORT SHAWN -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d1a5e776cc34de7aa7200eadd6f34c9&_e=DO0Niq8etEY2k7fLaNeA2py9QVTb7NpDj_qiEZTDKUGsqLO5DYQ6lHXHFzvnMBSdzyZJkVpv0MPsh45GOMFY267pf0CowctFCOegeA9RZnLSESRtffu1Glod1z4ljI27y7Lm0DJ7sx7krMeH-DOaRsRd_Bn0YdmCMwKJTxoP3MMX3wlsWR3mezcPT0cMZznKzYGHLIzmlTS8GWWZmfFYExw8Aeo8kaS9Ks8Pcv--Nkz_f8-mLkuJ77UFAbMkQGUL97JJHXD6gkRIUiWvX9xvURK-psWXjTTBYWRBPdHoDoA8nKjKbcb2OzL05G8NWEk29jmMUKT7PqOtgeky18rHmfwa5Bn9atlJMADjzzLZlR6xmpoWx3pHGtTtsLl3uXJX71XmlTns9T5Zl-IS_3rbzqF0N6_bjvME73mBaUTbB2B91ULXjpUxqiJF4Von3HpLmLjyh5x1p4i-eGnh24k-53vW7PpLRcYXhRIbvXBD35FQbAcnCC_gHE_9PIt2ycQC)
President Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has left American civilians and troops trapped. Not to mention innocent Afghan men, women and children clinging to airplanes and passing babies over fences to solders to hopefully save their lives.

**This is nothing to be congratulated** – it is just about the worst possible thing that could have happened. And it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and refused to accept the possibility that this could happen.

_**But Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar think its great!**_

To make matters worse, Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has also left America’s military arsenal in the hands of the Taliban.

This is an image of American Humvees that the Taliban now has control of, along with planes, helicopters, drones, firearms, and tactical equipment like night-vision goggles and communication gear.

The Taliban could and likely will now use this arsenal against the people of Afghanistan – especially those who aided the allies – American soldiers and civilians, and maybe against us.

The world and our country are now less safe due to this botched troop rollout, and everything that I and my fellow soldiers fought for in Afghanistan over the last 20 years has been undone.

_**Yet, Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar congratulate President Biden and insult what I put my life on the line for!**_

[**Katie Porter MUST be held accountable, and I need your help to replace her in Congress and restore ACTUAL leadership in America.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d1a5e776cc34de7aa7200eadd6f34c9&_e=DO0Niq8etEY2k7fLaNeA2py9QVTb7NpDj_qiEZTDKUGsqLO5DYQ6lHXHFzvnMBSdzyZJkVpv0MPsh45GOMFY267pf0CowctFCOegeA9RZnLSESRtffu1Glod1z4ljI27y7Lm0DJ7sx7krMeH-DOaRsRd_Bn0YdmCMwKJTxoP3MMX3wlsWR3mezcPT0cMZznKzYGHLIzmlTS8GWWZmfFYExw8Aeo8kaS9Ks8Pcv--Nkz_f8-mLkuJ77UFAbMkQGUL97JJHXD6gkRIUiWvX9xvUVxeSMnHz9mE000nBVw4ptTOUVqPtHPWiW3T59R0Q6SB3dEXADz-v0--WqdlATfBVaAvpGHB4jq9d1mO2aYiObOOQiJbR0FobT_cUwSf1FH17atdLdU0iXdZEMX987f2VPGfjHkoDY7ch20Juy1ntQn0WRaiQGTUcWNY5NYbVIckZnEerqY0CAwe5s__09Y2cv_I-iXbvnndDb2WzVe6-wT5pXLFheSU36ILYz0Rsnko)

clean_body: As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by this ignorance and disrespect. | Peter, My opponent Katie Porter previously joined Ilhan Omar and the rest of their radical friends in the House Progressive Caucus in congratulating President Biden for pulling our troops out of Afghanistan, which has left that country in chaos at the hands of the Taliban with both American lives and innocent Afghan in serious jeopardy. Does Katie Porter still think this was a good idea? Her constituents are left wondering. It has been five days since the Taliban took Kabul and she has said NOTHING. Porter and Omar claim the war that I fought in personally to protect them and our entire country from terrorism, and in which thousands of American soldiers gave their lives, was just a distraction... As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect with which this statement was made. This is exactly why we need new leadership in Congress and in America – and clearly leftist Katie Porter needs to be among the first to go. President Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has left American civilians and troops trapped. Not to mention innocent Afghan men, women and children clinging to airplanes and passing babies over fences to solders to hopefully save their lives. This is nothing to be congratulated – it is just about the worst possible thing that could have happened. And it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and refused to accept the possibility that this could happen. But Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar think its great! To make matters worse, Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has also left America’s military arsenal in the hands of the Taliban. This is an image of American Humvees that the Taliban now has control of, along with planes, helicopters, drones, firearms, and tactical equipment like night-vision goggles and communication gear. The Taliban could and likely will now use this arsenal against the people of Afghanistan – especially those who aided the allies – American soldiers and civilians, and maybe against us. The world and our country are now less safe due to this botched troop rollout, and everything that I and my fellow soldiers fought for in Afghanistan over the last 20 years has been undone. Yet, Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar congratulate President Biden and insult what I put my life on the line for! President Biden and Katie Porter have both failed America, and they both must be kicked out of office so America can have real and responsible leadership. - As an Afghanistan war veteran who loves my country, I will give my district and America the leadership we need to resolve this crisis and make sure Americans are never failed like this again. For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. **As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect with which this statement was made.**

clean_body: As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by this ignorance and disrespect. | Peter, My opponent Katie Porter previously joined Ilhan Omar and the rest of their radical friends in the House Progressive Caucus in congratulating President Biden for pulling our troops out of Afghanistan, which has left that country in chaos at the hands of the Taliban with both American lives and innocent Afghan in serious jeopardy. Does Katie Porter still think this was a good idea? Her constituents are left wondering. It has been five days since the Taliban took Kabul and she has said NOTHING. Porter and Omar claim the war that I fought in personally to protect them and our entire country from terrorism, and in which thousands of American soldiers gave their lives, was just a distraction... As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect with which this statement was made. This is exactly why we need new leadership in Congress and in America – and clearly leftist Katie Porter needs to be among the first to go. President Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has left American civilians and troops trapped. Not to mention innocent Afghan men, women and children clinging to airplanes and passing babies over fences to solders to hopefully save their lives. This is nothing to be congratulated – it is just about the worst possible thing that could have happened. And it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and refused to accept the possibility that this could happen. But Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar think its great! To make matters worse, Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has also left America’s military arsenal in the hands of the Taliban. This is an image of American Humvees that the Taliban now has control of, along with planes, helicopters, drones, firearms, and tactical equipment like night-vision goggles and communication gear. The Taliban could and likely will now use this arsenal against the people of Afghanistan – especially those who aided the allies – American soldiers and civilians, and maybe against us. The world and our country are now less safe due to this botched troop rollout, and everything that I and my fellow soldiers fought for in Afghanistan over the last 20 years has been undone. Yet, Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar congratulate President Biden and insult what I put my life on the line for! President Biden and Katie Porter have both failed America, and they both must be kicked out of office so America can have real and responsible leadership. As an Afghanistan war veteran who loves my country, I will give my district and America the leadership we need to resolve this crisis and make sure Americans are never failed like this again. For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. name: CNN UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: appalled;
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you add your name to let us know you CONDEMN Republican lies and misinformation?
| | | **_CNN BREAKING: Republican House leader lies at least 5 times in 7-minute Fox News interview_**
---

We're DISGUSTED.

Kevin McCarthy --_the House Republican fighting to replace Nancy Pelosi as Speaker_ \-- just went on Fox News and told a series of dangerous lies.

If we let Republicans play games with the truth, we risk losing our House Majority and all of our progress to Trump's loyalist, extremist Republicans.

[**Quickly -- will you add your name to let us know you CONDEMN Republican lies and misinformation?******](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3-a_)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [MISSING >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [CONDEMN REPUBLICAN LIES >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)
---

We're outraged.

Kevin McCarthy -- _the top House Republican fighting to replace Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House_ \-- just went on Fox News and told a series of disgusting lies.

**He lied** about our economic recovery from Trump's COVID-induced recession.

**He lied** about the Republican-led voter suppression campaign.

**And he lied** about the brave Texas Democrats who resisted the GOP's latest attacks on our democracy.

We refuse to go back to Donald Trump's lie-filled, conspiratorial style of government.

**It 's on us to rise up and make it clear we REFUSE to let Republicans get away with these conspiracy theories and lies. **

**[So please, will you be 1 of 30 Democrats in your state to CONDEMN Kevin McCarthy and his Republicans for all of their lies?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQrNabWC~)**

---
[BEFORE MIDNIGHT, let us know: Do you CONDEMN Republican lies? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45529749&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NjY0NDA4MQS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45529749&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NjY0NDA4MQS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: 2A Update (via Team Freitas)
subject: actions speak louder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
**Friend, this is URGENT. ** Democrats keep saying no one wants to take your guns and my opponent, Annette Hyde, says she supports our 2A rights but on closer inspection her actions don’t match her words.
Here’s why:
1. **She founded a local chapter of Moms Demand Action, an anti-second amendment organization.****

**
2. **She is endorsed by gun-control lobbying group, Everytown.****

**
3. **Annette is hosting a fundraiser with the founder of Moms Demand Action, Shannon Watts.**

**These actions prove that Annette’s loyalties lie with Biden and the radical left who want to shut down our Second Amendment rights. **
What do you think, Friend?

clean_body: Friend, this is URGENT. Democrats keep saying no one wants to take your guns and my opponent, Annette Hyde, says she supports our 2A rights but on closer inspection her actions don’t match her words. Here’s why: 1. She founded a local chapter of Moms Demand Action, an anti-second amendment organization. 2. She is endorsed by gun-control lobbying group, Everytown. 3. Annette is hosting a fundraiser with the founder of Moms Demand Action, Shannon Watts. These actions prove that Annette’s loyalties lie with Biden and the radical left who want to shut down our Second Amendment rights. What do you think, Friend? Are you concerned Biden and his anti-gun backers will take your guns away? Nick is deeply concerned about the left's gun grabbing agenda and will vehemently oppose any anti-second amendment agenda. That’s why it’s CRUCIAL for Nick to know how important this issue is to YOU, Friend. Thank you, Nick Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
