clean_body: | | | | What can't they accomplish together Friend, Lisa Murkowski’s true colors are “Biden Blue.” She consistently works hand-in-hand with Bident to accomplish the Far-Left agenda: MORE gun regulations, MORE restrictions on First Amendment rights, and MORE green energy bills that kill Alaska’s economy and jobs. Who knows what “MORE” is on the horizon for these two! Together, Biden and Murkowski have been pushing MORE on us for 20 years. Enough is enough! Our Alaskan way of life is in danger with these two in charge. Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | =

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, This week was a sad week for America. The weakness and lack of leadership from the Biden Administration directly resulted in an inability to secure the ground in Afghanistan and get all of our brave troops, American citizens, and those Afghans that put their lives on the line for our interests out of harm’s way. Allowing foreign adversaries to dictate conditions that put American lives at risk is inexcusable and unforgivable. Jane, her family, and the entire campaign’s thoughts and prayers are with the family and friends of the fallen heroes we lost this week. Their service will never be forgotten. **Jane Timken on Biden's Saigon Moment** Last Saturday, Jane along with decorated Army veteran Brook Harless penned an op-ed in the Canton Repository about Joe Biden’s feckless leadership and the devastating effect it’s having on our standing abroad and the women of Afghanistan. “The consequences for women’s rights cannot be overstated. After years of reform, Afghan women and girls will now be forced out of schools and work and back into the home. They will be forced into full facial and body coverings, only allowed in public with a male escort, and many will be sold into slavery. Those who resist these extremist conditions will face public floggings, executions, or be hunted down. Women like Zarifa Ghafari, Afghanistan’s first female mayor who said: “I’m sitting here waiting for them to come. There is no one to help me or my family ... they will come for people like me and kill me.” This is heartbreaking. America and our leaders cannot turn a blind eye to these horrors and abuses of human rights that are bound to come. America and our leaders cannot turn a blind eye to the terrorism that will reemerge with emboldened enemies on the world stage. America and our leaders cannot turn a blind eye to our open Southern border as terrorist prisoners have been released and stream through countries, unwatched and unmitigated.” You can read the full piece [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=sE17ueeV_Un09JeL2nQtYz5JtRP27222Kgh1QX1w37K9MQ6DZh_6lcxafj-w6cmS_dxKAkF8mDZFOQg2LnaTbXdfFjDmlMXzGnX6kFMO-Ugmh7tdk03P2KJO6hAbHEArgB5j90bG4cCagIIFIplzSFZk2FPCFAtlLqaup9Nf9749nP67V7TmWPJPI0Blvmo1Kerq6ztNO-qrjH0cCBybyqQARqjahk8Na_yPK57SG2Rur6SkYf8GobsztNwUXydzQeSZOFBFMCw0n0gj34nR5ubT2M8wKLIPeNlR_9-uV2F9FCe8yALVxfFdDdkh_4TU8M3htDQ7Bd7G8OkL3UXRiOdXmjhv3v1rCCw1cgilTkTMOoccyXmGTjRIFUbejGv3qydS9KmqvHVneosH6bURJmeL2GDPa6knZw-6ZbudA7ygIpdX3cfdp_g-GT119fwMdHT-FfB3pQPudIPWiK3XRSBvMq6iYagIw3S_LGVFcpLgD0eZZEZxK1Cm-jkN1ZH1u5rbOpBRVy5rg9pjTxw8FPafq3cEtfsXB9vC6wZlF45YiIcQGyjetUyZt3fac1CXy5SNR9ITQr022oB7aAbfX1xn4PJztjbpZbmcpwwlx7hPzAnyzgdfZLvZhv04yuF3D7rFbXPVmlNKkz7_vhlk0wbWJgr-p7CAUmVUNtbGdzmMUJYQ5MzHEawNu4z5EkXAQzqgRQgs3Av-UxECJrb2khMob3-WmbQGYb_JKzu1qSQVchzVqZuITUjlv8pToqqRn-u5tQS01omgMImonqd65aHwwDCr40H_NGlEh1x-wU-emgdnh0pTrmMsYQl9qOT1ezd8MYtaPUSJMs9UQusmI7caf7dEy4V5LDnwEPUUxORZyE7ChYVDvAitAeCZRtZ-yH6WhQHrXPZFgQ_jbA12WoSM4pd0w8uASezKlH4RJT0%3D). **From the Trail** Stark County Votes for Women is a fantastic group with the great goal of supporting Republican women for office. Jane joined them for a great event last Sunday. Later that day, Jane was thrilled to join Coshocton County GOP Chair Steve Hall at the Coshocton County GOP Corn Roast. A big crowd of fired up voters showed up at Schumaker Farms. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=WKINsQYLue9pqHJtMUQl1X_2LQo_2x_BEeQKx__lw9W_p4bl246sKOWh1J0eqEIP9AwTgzVspa7_lKLuGPTJ1OKyl9pv_CAluqD4djKy_DpKP_c4wWibIlvuNCh3DrXFzgzCJ0OBCn2aguXwCt-pKrBbcptbR10NbPvFN9M3CxJynUVOHBd40sWW5viiMu3XWmT1yfwBTi5ikkYs29jnJEf5W_VpIyThejCrjEXgtCAjpQZlqFNHxi29n4jocS7sLQvnYX6jHCntXSiCTojEOt8D7dHvwq79_tjp8Z4KOg-glfZLPWQ4me2JepVRfc_W) On Monday night, Jane traveled to Butler County for the Butler County Freedom Rally with Corey Lewandowski and Sheriff Richard Jones. A great event with a HUGE crowd that were fired up to take back our country in 2022. On Tuesday, Jane continued her statewide listening tour on education and Critical Race Theory in Chagrin Falls. Parents across the state are concerned about what’s being taught to their children as they head back to school and Jane will be those parents’ voices in the U.S. Senate. Later that day, Jane joined the Stark Leaders PAC Summer Picnic in her own backyard. Good friends, a good picnic, and good conversations with the leaders of Stark County. On Wednesday, Jane traveled to Tuscarawas County for an event with her supporters, including Tuscarawas County GOP Chair Doug Wills. Later that night, Jane headed down to Chillicothe for the Ross County Republican Women’s Club meeting. **Media Roundup** While Jane was busy crisscrossing the state this week, she also had time to share her America First message with national and local media outlets. On Monday, Jane joined Dr. Gina Loudon on Real America’s Voice to discuss Biden’s failed leadership as President and Commander in Chief. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=WKINsQYLue9pqHJtMUQl1fuI5adm1wG9pXCdQjnGHylgjW52tQfxitB1Wd8uN-aU8xqf3PmiaOF-_ygUoIsf48aUJNEkhUPOAvQmr_XrppA2bhHGJB6Txucx43p4isC3tW0q3gKu8Zz-B_teZH0SQYN1V3t-K7yTzaa36z793V2teA28mLNZJO3jJevB3gBj390XhNitTp1zhIDCqd1xmxUhEY0sB0--M6Jxok8t_hvKGdKZIXlDKlEw6uAtYWpwaXvmDC9vFMvluIJHDqv1qm42a8L8Vw6aeo8R8KoocZA%3D) On Wednesday, Jane sat down with the Tuscarawas Times Reporter while she was in Dover. "I'm the only candidate who's been in the trenches, fighting for the America First agenda. As chair of the Ohio Republican Party I put 150,000 miles on my car crisscrossing around the state, talking to our families, our businesses and our communities. I'm the one that has a real understanding of Ohio. And that's why I'm going to the United States Senate, to stand up, to fight for our Ohio values.” Read the full article [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=WKINsQYLue9pqHJtMUQl1b0Kxb_Dz_wz7ybEMbkfhSDNC_0D2UgxMOo-xN8eP8RPOqo5RqZr_HHOnvTlmzI23VDl9ajjEl4fBbE9cbICEG5uuW8ZN8yq53-ZEFmS1PmCUNG6UOP6WJN0x-SbDekrAUS86D5lfl75x0GM8HG4dL2CyJ1PWCim4g9masH6Ed0ecOiXIVKBcjpRQuuTjJ6-l-N8vef7ovb7hpGh67SZsN4OtpFs7EH8JY1aoAtmH7rzsB0Aq3KT93bW9FpLn3DMglXQMLfPwgT_CzYXtUHVCbc1Z3ilzNc0879dcF-k2vrQ33Imghl9SQQHDkIvhiRREsUqPWK_hzE9W8gnWyxXZ2tqT3iSKFwWm_npT4qSPsjY). Finally, Jane shared her thoughts about Critical Race Theory with the [Chagrin Valley Times](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=uuKvhrVitTyLnFLHNj2OEMjgvS3cg-WwCZmjl_UE01yNz-c_U5MKSXOjGUYFGBOF0M7DFV5pV9SQBH9Wy181wfSfWsQotti0L6n4DTRVLw6C1M8pF9a-Wm6cNsGjiTo1d8qfFmyw_yXlhxWqLj1AdlHRRg9JaY49yq_iX9cLKh_F0UW4Oq0exBJgDezUzJEg2AU8vGmqCSdiCYqe2C9w_cUOAIhPudXS6bd2MgCUT7fKek5PqTGmK7MONV98ogyt8-2VkoKXPsqIspDuUVpbE1xXunxezDM8K0amaI9pqUYc7fgxlUtSkIe4S12887O6UbwHDUNE4FE6wx58AKYukGcJY4P-IsFcyYWP6C04aVIQOaAScP1iO04lIqRKgCr-) “In my mind, this is against the teachings of Martin Luther King and we are to judge each other based on the content of our character, not the color of our skin,” Ms. Timken said of critical race theory. “It is dividing America. I think putting children in boxes, based on how they were born, they have no choice. I think it also sends the wrong message to black and brown kids that they are victims and that they will never succeed. It’s absolutely wrong and un-American.”

Read the full piece [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=uuKvhrVitTyLnFLHNj2OEMjgvS3cg-WwCZmjl_UE01yNz-c_U5MKSXOjGUYFGBOF0M7DFV5pV9SQBH9Wy181wfSfWsQotti0L6n4DTRVLw6C1M8pF9a-Wm6cNsGjiTo1d8qfFmyw_yXlhxWqLj1AdlHRRg9JaY49yq_iX9cLKh_JQxhDJ8HdEAINpLVNEKpEaSuEJFwOuY8rKgZ3pYwPG5wxi4yXrUW8bhML01Ns80VMDrGdC_Z7kF-OJza4cjyoMneaa48wGLPZjIlSSFt035a6yl1N4mjCjFQRCiNNFfVFeUo48DnzCR4QZMyKiLQ4EV5QurCMVTbpeSoyio4BzbWuEMKTaJjgFsJdAvOnomvWJL9qCWxOxCBJ7ERUNiLY).[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=uuKvhrVitTyLnFLHNj2OEMjgvS3cg-WwCZmjl_UE01yNz-c_U5MKSXOjGUYFGBOF0M7DFV5pV9SQBH9Wy181wfSfWsQotti0L6n4DTRVLw6C1M8pF9a-Wm6cNsGjiTo1d8qfFmyw_yXlhxWqLj1AdlHRRg9JaY49yq_iX9cLKh893POH1s_YMfza8uom25KOcwwEpl64iVeJFU_hY-fuyiEACoe9xcHm1EGw4A_rz_3LKtpUW2JyG1jD1DECchqZNDPqgl84g9cNr3uVRm1TFqhWhqhL1ikAOO6-LZPJQQhAAUPK9do5ZkJjyqclSm5yDvvB75hQhWU0GBcFRMUZ_udTQj536jhEXAntsIa2Q3LL_3QHWe0tXF6ZuSozcI6n) **Women for Jane** [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=WKINsQYLue9pqHJtMUQl1SzVNHPQrdyvJl6OJCv0rQlbuk0mkWXaqgzx95eZMoFKeloH3ltOXXasubYxhPWkWAfl4pBP__mPbwCGRAWzjk1v7YcSvKpjM7UPb2vCCsKqs2FUW8tsKbpOk7yQz22XD9iK90JMA2dQakBHogDZhyea0IWz3xTD9Z_ajPi9yEAzZL_Y4_fvhIW7J5KnBSjXKIKwKgeiKQtJGTJimXwN98uuaqD_F-yllX0ilG5AKkzLMSZcbqJ9b4vwMUDRc2mZwwCAdsmIfi9wHU-Bg7CrJbokX5Rz5gV_ksYaRovs0sTiP_-D-aKR_sXpEpDcZb1KP12kCyzrYT1VMP5RALkdT-kkW075wBniyoaOkkeZ-CtOyQD6ZREQiYYjH0jJyGxmzVGMPQ5W-bf1Q3r0nG8nAoyeHpjTaoCC2yDQqJkkvXo7pIz1hLmpcItgP4GwqZyM7_EoT6km7GytTv3FGYIw9EHsEvWeYWWDr5ZF0umuU2UvV4yXIy1Pcgw9urOfmXVMylcRTpOVI_ORQhY4dpsjzbI%3D) Today the campaign launched our Women for Jane event in Powell with a fantastic event. Over 100 women from across the state came out today in support of the future first female U.S. Senator from Ohio. It is humbling to see so much support from women across the state for Jane’s America First campaign. This group is committed to Jane’s vision for the U.S. Senate and know that she is the best, grassroots candidate in the race. If you’re interested in joining this group or joining the campaign, make sure to go to [our website](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=71e2ce8534524730be2ed255c7d2c3e9&_e=WKINsQYLue9pqHJtMUQl1SzVNHPQrdyvJl6OJCv0rQnRGLKuMl24uH6OjPTReZmTYNQt95SgiOp3WH1KWNq0oLW6-tUeTOI0Sz3ohow-y31-n3j39qbS0ekgpBnMfRVR2lf1ceEs4r9h3OmakQQOyWT6Gnp9BPJbFWqmLzU8KsZGFfxzRpjWh4h3qY-2Yf2s5fdyfGrCONdeYIgU7lxHy78zhAVJjBq3V2KbG213Vabilod-qdgivDHVIV85ZcLY7R8MBhx-Gg-CoJnVt3PxAKCYuCC05JS0IFkKJiYyVN0%3D) to join the team! clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, This week was a sad week for America. The weakness and lack of leadership from the Biden Administration directly resulted in an inability to secure the ground in Afghanistan and get all of our brave troops, American citizens, and those Afghans that put their lives on the line for our interests out of harm’s way. Allowing foreign adversaries to dictate conditions that put American lives at risk is inexcusable and unforgivable. Jane, her family, and the entire campaign’s thoughts and prayers are with the family and friends of the fallen heroes we lost this week. Their service will never be forgotten. Jane Timken on Biden's Saigon Moment Last Saturday, Jane along with decorated Army veteran Brook Harless penned an op-ed in the Canton Repository about Joe Biden’s feckless leadership and the devastating effect it’s having on our standing abroad and the women of Afghanistan. “The consequences for women’s rights cannot be overstated. After years of reform, Afghan women and girls will now be forced out of schools and work and back into the home. They will be forced into full facial and body coverings, only allowed in public with a male escort, and many will be sold into slavery. Those who resist these extremist conditions will face public floggings, executions, or be hunted down. Women like Zarifa Ghafari, Afghanistan’s first female mayor who said: “I’m sitting here waiting for them to come. There is no one to help me or my family ... they will come for people like me and kill me.” This is heartbreaking. America and our leaders cannot turn a blind eye to these horrors and abuses of human rights that are bound to come. America and our leaders cannot turn a blind eye to the terrorism that will reemerge with emboldened enemies on the world stage. America and our leaders cannot turn a blind eye to our open Southern border as terrorist prisoners have been released and stream through countries, unwatched and unmitigated.” You can read the full piece . From the Trail Stark County Votes for Women is a fantastic group with the great goal of supporting Republican women for office. Jane joined them for a great event last Sunday. Later that day, Jane was thrilled to join Coshocton County GOP Chair Steve Hall at the Coshocton County GOP Corn Roast. A big crowd of fired up voters showed up at Schumaker Farms. On Monday night, Jane traveled to Butler County for the Butler County Freedom Rally with Corey Lewandowski and Sheriff Richard Jones. A great event with a HUGE crowd that were fired up to take back our country in 2022. On Tuesday, Jane continued her statewide listening tour on education and Critical Race Theory in Chagrin Falls. Parents across the state are concerned about what’s being taught to their children as they head back to school and Jane will be those parents’ voices in the U.S. Senate. Later that day, Jane joined the Stark Leaders PAC Summer Picnic in her own backyard. Good friends, a good picnic, and good conversations with the leaders of Stark County. On Wednesday, Jane traveled to Tuscarawas County for an event with her supporters, including Tuscarawas County GOP Chair Doug Wills. Later that night, Jane headed down to Chillicothe for the Ross County Republican Women’s Club meeting. Media Roundup While Jane was busy crisscrossing the state this week, she also had time to share her America First message with national and local media outlets. On Monday, Jane joined Dr. Gina Loudon on Real America’s Voice to discuss Biden’s failed leadership as President and Commander in Chief. On Wednesday, Jane sat down with the Tuscarawas Times Reporter while she was in Dover. "I'm the only candidate who's been in the trenches, fighting for the America First agenda. As chair of the Ohio Republican Party I put 150,000 miles on my car crisscrossing around the state, talking to our families, our businesses and our communities. I'm the one that has a real understanding of Ohio. And that's why I'm going to the United States Senate, to stand up, to fight for our Ohio values.” Read the full article . Finally, Jane shared her thoughts about Critical Race Theory with the - “In my mind, this is against the teachings of Martin Luther King and we are to judge each other based on the content of our character, not the color of our skin,” Ms. Timken said of critical race theory. “It is dividing America. I think putting children in boxes, based on how they were born, they have no choice. I think it also sends the wrong message to black and brown kids that they are victims and that they will never succeed. It’s absolutely wrong and un-American.” Read the full piece Women for Jane Today the campaign launched our Women for Jane event in Powell with a fantastic event. Over 100 women from across the state came out today in support of the future first female U.S. Senator from Ohio. It is humbling to see so much support from women across the state for Jane’s America First campaign. This group is committed to Jane’s vision for the U.S. Senate and know that she is the best, grassroots candidate in the race. If you’re interested in joining this group or joining the campaign, make sure to go to to join the team! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Stakes Have Peaked](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorw-OTgY9d6_NjOdm6VZaWv&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug_27_final&n=1) A federal court has just tossed the lawsuit to cancel the Recall that was promoted by Newsom’s allies. This comes as the stakes in the election have reached peak levels. A chilling new bill would require vaccination papers to enter restaurants, gyms, movie theaters, and more. I will fight in every way I can to stop AB 455. This is not who we are as a state or a country. Now is our chance to reclaim our government. That was my message at Wednesday’s final debate, which you can watch [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqcC53M5I5t4B1tdU-UbwVtTgoCgsozXKnQXQ8SopDhUw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug_27_final&n=2). On behalf of all New Hampshire Republicans, thank you to our Veterans and current active military who risk everything in order to protect American freedoms. We will never forget the sacrifices, and the lives lost in order to ensure U.S citizens can live without fear. **

| **MESSAGE FROM THE REPUBLICAN LEADER**
House Republicans and Friends Across New Hampshire,

Especially as schools begin to reopen around the state, we are reminded how critical a proper education is to forming well-rounded and intelligent citizens. [This week as Education Freedom Account Applications go live, I encourage all families to go online to see if you qualify and to fill out an application.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fnh.scholarshipfund.org%2Fapply%2Fnh-education-freedom-accounts%2F%3Ffbclid=IwAR3y-4Lj32d0sfKaDWlqFzWRrnkNDvLpMR40xrp862K8oSTvKoUDOZNTX-M/1/0100017b897ae7ee-07e8fac2-bd02-49a0-a2d0-875943449f5c-000000/uonuhkPuaa5xL6adpGovFYErLn0=233)

This year, our caucus has worked hard to ensure that if you are ignored by your local school board, you have options. Whether it is homeschooling, transferring schools, or sending your child to a charter school, House Republicans understand that there is no "one-size fits all" solution to providing our children with an environment where they can learn.

Also, as legislators continue to prepare to file their legislation for the upcoming session, I want to remind everyone that in observance of Labor Day, all New Hampshire State Offices will be closed on Monday, September 6th.

Finally, I would like to extend our caucus' gratitude toward all of our men and women who have served our country in Afghanistan. We hope to see all Americans safely evacuated as soon as possible and call upon our fellow legislators and leaders to help assure this is done in a timely and urgent manner.

All the best,

Jason Osborne, House Majority Leader

| **_Senate Republican Update _**
---
| |
---
| | **Become friends with NH Senate Republicans! **

_ Follow their page on_ [**Facebook**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fnhsenaterepublicans%2F/1/0100017b897ae7ee-07e8fac2-bd02-49a0-a2d0-875943449f5c-000000/qABh-Of7vNxdc0eaJmYUrMsxiSY=233)!

******A win for school choice**

This week, the Joint Legislative Committee on Administrative Rules voted along party lines to approve rules to implement New Hampshire’s Education Freedom Accounts Act.

This innovative school choice program will for the first time allow families in need the opportunity to leverage state education funding for alternatives to their local schools. We know that every child learns differently, and while some students thrive in their local district schools, others struggle and need another path.

Education Freedom Accounts use state dollars for non-public school tuition, hardware and software for remote learning, transportation, testing, and even Community College. Expanding school choice will give families in need the chance to access the best education for their children. I am proud of the work that Senators Ward, Hennessey, and Ricciardi put in on the Senate Education Committee to craft this important and ground-breaking legislation. Because of this week’s vote, families will be able to set up EFAs for their children this fall.

New Hampshire families have more choices than ever before because House and Senate Republicans and Governor Sununu trust New Hampshire families to guide the education of their children.

Sen. Chuck Morse

---
| |

| **Republican Spotlight : Representative Joe Alexander******
---
| |
---
| | ** This week’s Republican of the week is Representative Joe Alexander!

Rep. Alexander has represented Hillsborough 6 since 2018, serving on the House Judiciary Committee. This past year Rep. Alexander became the chair of the New Hampshire Young Republicans, which is hosting their annual Pig Roast event this Saturday (8/28). It is critical to have young activists like Joe in order to help engage the next generation of Republican leadership and increase youth involvement!

Thank you Representative Alexander for your hard work here in New Hampshire, and for ensuring we will have future Republicans to lead the Granite State!**

---

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

I am extremely disheartened to see the current crisis unfolding overseas, but I pray that all Americans are returned safely to U.S soil. On behalf of all New Hampshire Republicans, thank you to our Veterans and current active military who risk everything in order to protect American freedoms. We will never forget the sacrifices, and the lives lost in order to ensure U.S citizens can live without fear. | Stephan Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | | | Weekly Governor's Glance | | | | | | "Follow Governor Chris Sununu on Twitter!" | Upcoming Events | | | August 27th Murphy's Taproom with Congresswoman Cammack | | | "Free" | | August 27th Nashua Republican Steak out | | | "Sold Out " | | August 28th Young Republicans Annual Pig Roast | | | "Buy Tickets" | | August 28th _ SRW Chili Fest | | | "Buy Tickets" | | September 9th _ Lake Winnipesaukee Cruise | | | "Buy Tickets" | | September 12th Greenland GOP Thunder Over The Bay | | | "Buy Tickets" | | October 8th Amos Tuck Dinner Featuring Sen. Tim Scott | | | "Buy Tickets" | | October 22-23rd NHFRW Leadership Conference | | | "Buy Tickets" | | | | | | | MESSAGE FROM THE REPUBLICAN LEADER House Republicans and Friends Across New Hampshire, Especially as schools begin to reopen around the state, we are reminded how critical a proper education is to forming well-rounded and intelligent citizens. This year, our caucus has worked hard to ensure that if you are ignored by your local school board, you have options. Whether it is homeschooling, transferring schools, or sending your child to a charter school, House Republicans understand that there is no "one-size fits all" solution to providing our children with an environment where they can learn. Also, as legislators continue to prepare to file their legislation for the upcoming session, I want to remind everyone that in observance of Labor Day, all New Hampshire State Offices will be closed on Monday, September 6th. Finally, I would like to extend our caucus' gratitude toward all of our men and women who have served our country in Afghanistan. We hope to see all Americans safely evacuated as soon as possible and call upon our fellow legislators and leaders to help assure this is done in a timely and urgent manner. All the best, Jason Osborne, House Majority Leader | | To view the entire House Calendar for the week, click the link below! | | "Calender Link" | | | Senate Republican Update | | | | Become friends with NH Senate Republicans! Follow their page on ! ****A win for school choice This week, the Joint Legislative Committee on Administrative Rules voted along party lines to approve rules to implement New Hampshire’s Education Freedom Accounts Act. This innovative school choice program will for the first time allow families in need the opportunity to leverage state education funding for alternatives to their local schools. We know that every child learns differently, and while some students thrive in their local district schools, others struggle and need another path. Education Freedom Accounts use state dollars for non-public school tuition, hardware and software for remote learning, transportation, testing, and even Community College. Expanding school choice will give families in need the chance to access the best education for their children. I am proud of the work that Senators Ward, Hennessey, and Ricciardi put in on the Senate Education Committee to craft this important and ground-breaking legislation. Because of this week’s vote, families will be able to set up EFAs for their children this fall. New Hampshire families have more choices than ever before because House and Senate Republicans and Governor Sununu trust New Hampshire families to guide the education of their children. Sen. body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5be7ebabbef2445b974161a6552fec44&_e=or6NRiZXJjc3TaT0n8YmrNbd8ruLKWYOHY6kCHO4Ec3l5uUPn54p61DB7wGHbi0QHWLiPN4xG-X14g6Txdp7rODzxge0qVchcmkCVHVSXkw_51wy6Hvb1oIYuGDwRI5Fb3wEZ3t1ReAMeS3n-jtxjMo8UeppHs0dn-mxkxbCKDSJo5sgsniznhWbJR1VI3yq812AxEdX-93KL0QnciPtcqJsozPjGAX6bif_iOOH5MzXP8q7RP-ssHXLAyjPw_INLaIXVzwn-nCwmGz0x96uYpzIx26e24V22UmOyiSTHxtrzyQlpNMhZgrEVabeCwSjzjIK_ves6pxuuixumRKLtdl6b6lKushSyycUXj9426okD-5jkdAWf6kH2QkCiqeqjgUO-iLKoxgC8kIwdD8nM2nmr-17biamS9S2Mh57KdZk8qy87Q_7Y9IlGfF85VPSs2rxmNq3sru9UELawEj1Sa1JCUiGuckgtEXI0kydG8M%3D)

---
Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5be7ebabbef2445b974161a6552fec44&_e=or6NRiZXJjc3TaT0n8YmrNbd8ruLKWYOHY6kCHO4Ec3l5uUPn54p61DB7wGHbi0QHWLiPN4xG-X14g6Txdp7rODzxge0qVchcmkCVHVSXkw_51wy6Hvb1oIYuGDwRI5Fb3wEZ3t1ReAMeS3n-jtxjMo8UeppHs0dn-mxkxbCKDSJo5sgsniznhWbJR1VI3yq812AxEdX-93KL0QnciPtcqJsozPjGAX6bif_iOOH5MzXP8q7RP-ssHXLAyjPw_INKTnprP8nLYqipGkTuObULAxFUxWYL5fmVNYmVSwxhzfLMV24pE1pjxKs4kcPX7vXWOTG43JcXrfasSAz28lf19fp3O7P2CD-TQSd41Hdch3z-3KRgRydAEsAPUdxgXS1QlSD2r2soeGnydM8mHNkl0dgjHVQBmqM3UH_EwVhow_M3DiQ0xMeTt8blcr_gHph-FGBB4Be8oeZ6VZrptZtFNtjj943Z737hKsiXWxCcyY%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5be7ebabbef2445b974161a6552fec44&_e=or6NRiZXJjc3TaT0n8YmrNbd8ruLKWYOHY6kCHO4Ec3l5uUPn54p61DB7wGHbi0QHWLiPN4xG-X14g6Txdp7rODzxge0qVchcmkCVHVSXkw_51wy6Hvb1oIYuGDwRI5Fb3wEZ3t1ReAMeS3n-jtxjMo8UeppHs0dn-mxkxbCKDSJo5sgsniznhWbJR1VI3yq812AxEdX-93KL0QnciPtcqJsozPjGAX6bif_iOOH5MzXP8q7RP-ssHXLAyjPw_INMMUZszyvl6c9XRpEFuxVD6R0nW_GgwuWbaayNeT9xuDtGysW0wqwiqWYltLjOv5uB_THzIOiXJor9LaesOj8uLeKb4Qlf6SaAcuJRsXUZ4EvcqQu51_SM7TU18FaNTcX_Br8jXAhjGrGmzq6J3UZWiVPm6gURGyb__JW8MBel0dnxN5a5cy9Scf0ddeR4ZTmz05M3aj47ufVgEaJh4r9qQyA4zQuTSnPV31KPvvDfVM%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5be7ebabbef2445b974161a6552fec44&_e=or6NRiZXJjc3TaT0n8YmrNbd8ruLKWYOHY6kCHO4Ec3l5uUPn54p61DB7wGHbi0QHWLiPN4xG-X14g6Txdp7rODzxge0qVchcmkCVHVSXkw_51wy6Hvb1oIYuGDwRI5Fb3wEZ3t1ReAMeS3n-jtxjMo8UeppHs0dn-mxkxbCKDSJo5sgsniznhWbJR1VI3yq812AxEdX-93KL0QnciPtcqJsozPjGAX6bif_iOOH5MzXP8q7RP-ssHXLAyjPw_INm6rGXfMDTMLJuoc1s18xLL0aFVm9TGUFRuSRWGl2Z13z3ME2QRpQhGo5V9b7VVTqODMO4HvHsypgBkjRC5ya36_K2J_fxBq_rzmhmI9SgnxA6XRjnhTdqb2LwH9BqLK8MEi6nmD7l34uLU1P-Xl05g68QCN3tFSLl_xUKdPn8IciLa2Dn-nxFc6yHio73jKHMAXPvm5GTIQvdDXMuSHgkMBQOEkNJJUT9flNm0QWwcc%3D) **

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. body:
One thing we all share in common is a frustration for change, because there is nothing more important than the future of our chidren. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34779015/303061452/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiOGQ3NzU0LWEyMDctZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nHOlNVKlQdnDlZ55Kt8oR17PeS5CjAaKrhP9VPQlJzU=&emci=f55c3c95-9e07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7b8d7754-a207-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Simona Grace here, Founder of Moms in Office and mom in chief of the **Moms for Katie Porter** outreach. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms like Katie Porter so single moms like me can have better representation in Congress. **[I am reaching out to you because we are just a few days away from our end of the month deadline and we still need some help to fund our Katie Porter Childcare Fund so that we can pay for our candidates' childcare. Can I count on you today to chip in?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34779016/303061453/600483780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiOGQ3NzU0LWEyMDctZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nHOlNVKlQdnDlZ55Kt8oR17PeS5CjAaKrhP9VPQlJzU=)** Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. **[Will you make a contribution today to support our Childcare Fund as we lead this work to elect more moms to office?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34779017/303061454/600483780?refcode=0812&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiOGQ3NzU0LWEyMDctZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nHOlNVKlQdnDlZ55Kt8oR17PeS5CjAaKrhP9VPQlJzU=)** Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter **#momsquad** |

clean_body: One thing we all share in common is a frustration for change, because there is nothing more important than the future of our chidren. Hi Peter, Simona Grace here, Founder of Moms in Office and mom in chief of the Moms for Katie Porter outreach. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms like Katie Porter so single moms like me can have better representation in Congress. = Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. = Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter #momsquad | I will chip in to pay for childcare! = = = = = | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Herschel Walker
subject: Determination and teamwork
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5dd7ae3170f8440ca30473a8a965882f&_e=px5fmzmyt_yWG47GV-6RC9e1zzjugXGJNKN-x6j_7Dq0oTrmkIb8bQTr29YIOW89Gzrz6xVQf7OpMModdIjWECRX7ForY0L3j1eUE5B-Oh_grlLXQFDZ9fjdmsiekRlUDlyoClaFymLkN5t_RWF6frqDHRFW9A6xR4zJfhoQrpd9HiLJV46RZsEFO18aF8pT-I1l2LDkrrJfoD7JCr0AIjWgLOAm3W090XQu68Y8MPGP-w3Hvb-aRA340ciqFwdq2fMcAPS_t8fb7a2KAIyCrWWeNUGpcmRliLwmqEPQgoph1DhYUSzQ-Sc86OlReghnV3mKXr3__tLDBcu7RBCHXX9Blbi7KwNY1U3mdxmUAdtK-I1xL7y-RjiMLEVtEE46durHXbSQR2DLtnnIjONvwxz8ncKcC9p4vBHdPzkoK-Ws0Sl_-AuPScpso7WDU_szKqXe0dWh8oYVYgBO3WtkOg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5dd7ae3170f8440ca30473a8a965882f&_e=px5fmzmyt_yWG47GV-6RC9e1zzjugXGJNKN-x6j_7Dq0oTrmkIb8bQTr29YIOW89Gzrz6xVQf7OpMModdIjWECRX7ForY0L3j1eUE5B-Oh_grlLXQFDZ9fjdmsiekRlUDlyoClaFymLkN5t_RWF6frqDHRFW9A6xR4zJfhoQrpd9HiLJV46RZsEFO18aF8pT-I1l2LDkrrJfoD7JCr0AIjWgLOAm3W090XQu68Y8MPGP-w3Hvb-aRA340ciqFwdqkDgotuOnVl5A5JL2zfq7lNMbGtJnib03bQuf6fBEjnvk_0qRq2nXPe6UONJ8u0YdAUyW2TUr0WM0V54eL6ziQH0CFlL2Hl8YRoSwBBrYYCi_ZI3SBZW-vJ8YaE3dpIgJI_5e9ADPUv1ow7QewJ9PmdQ8-1jYCL8_3SpcWQKsgwD1puSzVznzqUpu5npdPhX3X2QIkH5H7qX0uonZ2RHvxg%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5dd7ae3170f8440ca30473a8a965882f&_e=px5fmzmyt_yWG47GV-6RC9e1zzjugXGJNKN-x6j_7Dq0oTrmkIb8bQTr29YIOW89Gzrz6xVQf7OpMModdIjWECRX7ForY0L3j1eUE5B-Oh_grlLXQFDZ9fjdmsiekRlUDlyoClaFymLkN5t_RWF6frqDHRFW9A6xR4zJfhoQrpd9HiLJV46RZsEFO18aF8pT-I1l2LDkrrJfoD7JCr0AIjWgLOAm3W090XQu68Y8MPGP-w3Hvb-aRA340ciqFwdqAC9GrjETTK8zpTEPSCK_p-DK9rT0SV6695Y_4CQeZGns-JbvNuoJQ6XFQj4uOWjtst8S2lhyrFt1bG7kvwlWuKebIsl3ige_ZUw3aGAsLXghdiBm9AYS5pohB8PKaEVQhTLjkv-3a7Yf3xZM97W6l90Cz020nVL0Dq3cu8uzEXlPXM2Bhrq0mGKsnkCpn7LbjaHqyo-ynkrRB8nhlxoNAw%3D%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5dd7ae3170f8440ca30473a8a965882f&_e=px5fmzmyt_yWG47GV-6RC9e1zzjugXGJNKN-x6j_7Dq0oTrmkIb8bQTr29YIOW89Gzrz6xVQf7OpMModdIjWECRX7ForY0L3j1eUE5B-Oh_grlLXQFDZ9fjdmsiekRlUDlyoClaFymLkN5t_RWF6frqDHRFW9A6xR4zJfhoQrpd9HiLJV46RZsEFO18aF8pT-I1l2LDkrrJfoD7JCr0AIjWgLOAm3W090XQu68Y8MPGP-w3Hvb-aRA340ciqFwdqGz9-hYVl2yPLcw1eUOp1iEi-0aVsUzl4fMbJlKJkUE4xxomtAfOzhp7ajh-o_5fpgIov08kyyCPsPgfGk22fUyhLKxqi-DPRyX_bd7sguyMZN0cMnWsSrZlECIJ8U_iJ6u0abgjCUyUwb9AXGT8wtGHmr1eS8g2OeCxcWo1eCMuM8Uve-2XVi5Tjhk1VzdTfqWsNZO8gJq9wWhDeF45wmQ%3D%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5dd7ae3170f8440ca30473a8a965882f&_e=px5fmzmyt_yWG47GV-6RC9e1zzjugXGJNKN-x6j_7Dq0oTrmkIb8bQTr29YIOW89Gzrz6xVQf7OpMModdIjWECRX7ForY0L3j1eUE5B-Oh_grlLXQFDZ9fjdmsiekRlUDlyoClaFymLkN5t_RWF6frqDHRFW9A6xR4zJfhoQrpd9HiLJV46RZsEFO18aF8pT-I1l2LDkrrJfoD7JCr0AIjWgLOAm3W090XQu68Y8MPGP-w3Hvb-aRA340ciqFwdqVs4msvZxlT7w1gXZxr8PAuWTk69yR_ulY2FKtdHEzbsV911IW_jjOkEt2O9tPTa-U4my-iFNlV8FK8jADhFcnspQZHvn-AvLGb4tQI0FHizrFjyP3BZCV_8vWIIw9Ap9eDDiMyRfW91MfUiwmXfxRGrwQ-J2jXwV5xED7b5Mw1OAw_nUsu5JdfGkgYZ8ZZWo549pnJ9jZLRtkhDDmdxkyw%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: Here’s how Democrats can protect voting rights: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | This is a historic move for Voting Rights, but we’re worried: Now that the John Lewis Voting Rights Act passed the House, it’s going to be an uphill battle in the Senate. | [We need [11] more signatures from Cresco!]() Listen -- it’s never been more important to pass this historic bill. Especially since far-right Republicans already CRUSHED the For the People Act. These disgusting attacks could suppress votes and steal the 2022 Election! Let’s get it done, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Mark McCloskey
subject: She threatened my life live on CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
Just recently, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. Donald J. Trump August 25th, 2021
The Leftist “select committee” has further exposed itself as a partisan sham and waste of taxpayer dollars with a request that’s timed to distract Americans from historic and global catastrophes brought on by the failures of Joe Biden and the Democrats. Unfortunately, this partisan exercise is being performed at the expense of long-standing legal principles of privilege. Executive privilege will be defended, not just on behalf of my Administration and the Patriots who worked beside me, but on behalf of the Office of the President of the United States and the future of our Nation. These Democrats only have one tired trick—political theater—and their latest request only reinforces that pathetic reality.

clean_body: This email is difficult to write, but I need to be straightforward with you. Jim Jordan reached out to you... Elise Stefanik reached out to you... Ron DeSantis reached out to you... Tim Scott reached out to you... Donald Trump Jr. reached out to you... Now I am reaching out to you one final time before our End-of-Month deadline... ** This email is difficult to write, but I need to be straightforward with you. Democrats are CRUSHING US in the fundraising race. They raked in $30+ million last month alone -- the Liberal dark money is flooding in!_ That was bad enough, but now our deadline is barreling toward us and we're still many donations behind! If more grassroots Conservatives fail to step up before midnight, it's all over! SEVEN top Republicans tried to reach you. Consider this your final notice: we only need a few more donations before midnight. Liberals have tens of millions of dollars stockpiled to defeat us at this very moment. If Republicans miss our all-important goal, we simply won 't have the resources to defend ourselves and America will fall to the Socialists!** I cannot -- and will not -- stand by the wayside and do nothing, but I need your help. Do you have the strength and determination to help in these final hours?
